subject: What a safe reopening looks like
body:
State by state, President Trump is helping to bring our great economy back to life. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97b6d2fc77&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **What a safe reopening looks like**

**State by state, **President Trump is helping to bring our great economy back to life.

**The strategy** for doing that was laid last month, when the President unveiled his Guidelines for [Opening Up America Again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0b47e20e3&e=3ee4985eea). This phased approach gives every governor a playbook to evaluate when and how to get their people safely back to work.

**Each state** has a full partner in the Trump Administration to make that happen. “I’ve sat in the task force meetings where [Assistant Secretary for Health] Admiral Giroir has talked to governors,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany told reporters yesterday.

**He “literally pulled** **out his chart** and said: ‘Governor X, here is your plan and your request for testing in order to safely reopen. I can assure you that that will be satisfied this month,’” she said.

**In addition to** this support from the White House Coronavirus Task Force, led by Vice President Mike Pence, the President himself has been meeting with state leaders at the White House, including governors from Florida, New York, New Jersey, and Louisiana.

**Today, President Trump** hosted Gov. Doug Burgum of North Dakota and Gov. Jared Polis of Colorado in the Cabinet Room. Burgum is a Republican, and Polis is a Democrat—underscoring President Trump’s commitment to putting partnership before politics as he works hard to get America back open for business.

**A safe reopening** is possible because of aggressive action at the start of this outbreak. Strong social distancing measures bought valuable time to mobilize a historic public- and private-sector response, which ensured adequate testing, access to personal protective equipment, and hospital resources to treat the sick and protect the healthy.

**🎬** [Operation Warp Speed will deliver vaccines & therapeutics in record time!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eee02d3006&e=3ee4985eea)

**Press Secretary:** [President Trump is fighting for the wellbeing of ALL Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c5553bc36f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎬**** ‘OBAMAGATE’: ****Suddenly, the Swamp goes quiet **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ec8f15a12&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **For nearly 3 years,** Democrats and their allies in the media lectured Americans about the seriousness of the Trump-Russia collusion hoax. Rarely a day went by when the false narrative didn’t appear in articles, op-eds, or liberal cable talk shows.

**Now, these pundits** are nowhere to be found on the subject.

**Newly released transcripts **might have something to do with that. [As they reveal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f43240c1b&e=3ee4985eea), former President Obama and Congressional Democrats have a lot of explaining to do.

**It turns out** there was never any shred of evidence tying then-candidate Donald Trump to a Russia collusion plot. That didn’t stop the Obama FBI from surveilling the Trump campaign, nor did it stop them from targeting Lieutenant General Michael Flynn.

**The Swamp** wasted years of our country’s time with sham investigations. At last, they’re going to be the ones answering some tough questions for the American people.

🎬[ CNN went from nonstop coverage to looking the other way](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2151d70c7&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [‘Obamagate’ is ‘the biggest political scandal of our time’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fbd9cc9e08&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| **President Trump and House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy listen to remarks during a meeting with Republican members of Congress **| May 8, 2020

name: GOP ALERTS
subject: Biden Helped Set Up General Flynn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Joe Biden lied to the American people about his involvement in the prosecution of General Michael Flynn.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42494670&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc2MTMxMjkyNQS2&spReportId=MTc2MTMxMjkyNQS2)
****
****
__
Peter,

Have you seen the breaking news?

Despite presumptive Democratic Presidential nominee Joe Biden's claims that he knew _nothing_ about the "unmasking" of General Michael Flynn, recent documents have revealed that _**not only was he informed by President Obama, but he participated in the secret process.**_ After being pressed on his involvement, Biden claimed it was nothing more than a "diversion."

Peter, this is serious. Joe Biden **lied** to the American people about his involvement in the prosecution of General Michael Flynn.

Senator Marsha Blackburn put it best:

"Somebody cooked up this plot. Somebody gave an order. Somebody did the dirty work. **Michael Flynn paid a price.****The Trump Administration paid a price.**_And the American taxpayer has footed the bill.__"_

The Democrats will stop at nothing to go after President Trump -- **this time they 've been caught in their lie.**

This issue shows how important it is that Republicans maintain the Senate Majority in November. Without leading Republicans like Marsha Blackburn on this issue, this development would have been swept under the rug by Obama, Comey, and Schumer.

**There has never been a more important election. We must retain the Senate in order to maintain honesty and transparency in Washington, and continue to defend the President against these baseless partisan attacks.**

_**We need to fight back and we need your help.**_

Donate now to help Senate Republicans fight back

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Reopening America - Safely
body:
There will be challenges, however... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Reopening America - Safely](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-j/)
For about two months now, much of America has been more or less shut down due to the COVID-19 pandemic. In this week's blog, I discuss President Trump's Reopen America Task Force and Ohio's reopening plan, known as the Responsible RestartOhio Plan. There will be challenges, however I think we Americans will prevail! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [COVID-19 and Murder Hornets](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-d/)
In my blog this week, I discuss how our lives have changed during this time of COVID-19 and to make matters worse, now we have to worry about an insect invasion! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [China Must be Held Accountable](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-u/)
To date, over 58,000 Americans have lost their lives due to the coronavirus pandemic. In this week's blog, I examine why communist China should be held accountable for the global devastation caused by this virus. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Reopen America Task Force](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog, I discuss why the Paycheck Protection Program ran out of cash, and the reason Democrats are holding up addition funds. I also write about President Trump's new task force and announced guidelines for reopening the economy and our country. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jklkyhg-kujkulhluu-f/)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Open NYS for Business
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Yesterday I joined my fellow elected officials from Western New York - Congressman Tom Reed, Senator Rob Ortt, and Assemblyman Mike Norris - for a tour of Diversified Manufacturing Inc. in Lockport, NY. Our tour highlighted how manufacturing companies are operating successfully while maintaining a safe working environment for employees and adhering to all COVID-19 recommended precautions. This is proof we can open our state safely and get our employees back to work. We have worked hard to mitigate COVID-19 but now it is time to re-open our economy and re-open our state - our families need to make a living and our small businesses are struggling. Across the country we are seeing states open up successfully and their Governors are providing a clear path forward. These Governors are harnessing the power of the private sector and working collaboratively to find innovative solutions for re-opening - and it is working. This just shows us that Governor Cuomo's single-handed control on the fate of our state, our small businesses, and our families needs to come to an end immediately and we need to work towards a prosperous future. As a small businessman, I know firsthand the struggles many businesses are facing around the state. We need to ensure their survival and success because they will be the driving comeback of our region. As your Congressman, I will be focused on supporting these small businesses and working towards creating a friendly environment so that we can create hundreds more and countless jobs - and that all starts with breaking down barriers for economic re-entry and letting businesses turn the open sign on. My message to Governor Cuomo: open New York for Business and let's get to work! Thank you for continued support and stay safe. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/x46482jiejfR763IlH5D4wbQ/wZTV4FKXVsiHVoYYlGSr7A) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/HyytcxxRdzihbFf2yeBlcQ/wZTV4FKXVsiHVoYYlGSr7A)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Support for Small Businesses
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We've asked a lot of Rhode Island's small businesses over the last two months, and I am eternally grateful for the way that they have protected the health of their fellow Rhode Islanders at great personal sacrifice. I'm proud that we've been able to help almost 300 small business through our business helpline, but I also know we need to do more to ensure that every small business has the tools it needs to adapt to the realities of COVID-19.
Today, I'm announcing that Rhode Island small businesses can apply to receive facemasks, disinfectant, and for those that need them, laptops to enable remote work.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018aHL85e3Q85EwyC6ft9KnuhlTkasMk-LJYLiexOaAe616oPBz_KGeUiYHxPNTvCjRg7qUxPjFuAwCP8vJonk3slZ3lyv7apGCgOsvLmsVBB7xhuUk4ZeAtcJMhinf3X_jR28MMYAo3hSPi6LdeJ0RI3U25h7euVdQbuCmG8YwLyiE4EZmZrfgJZW1-StqjM_kdlPNf1uKUc=&c=m7D2Ql_VpXacHKGYzZ6_7L0g6tAoNFmOr7DDpjnGjKUDNeK2jd_sPQ==&ch=F1xVrC8o9iyZPbiW7-vxV6xrStegP0GA9X4oZFTyr1FCrJJtUMyItQ==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018aHL85e3Q85EwyC6ft9KnuhlTkasMk-LJYLiexOaAe616oPBz_KGeUiYHxPNTvCjRg7qUxPjFuAwCP8vJonk3slZ3lyv7apGCgOsvLmsVBB7xhuUk4ZeAtcJMhinf3X_jR28MMYAo3hSPi6LdeJ0RI3U25h7euVdQbuCmG8YwLyiE4EZmZrfgJZW1-StqjM_kdlPNf1uKUc=&c=m7D2Ql_VpXacHKGYzZ6_7L0g6tAoNFmOr7DDpjnGjKUDNeK2jd_sPQ==&ch=F1xVrC8o9iyZPbiW7-vxV6xrStegP0GA9X4oZFTyr1FCrJJtUMyItQ==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| Starting next week, we will be distributing 500,000 masks,as well as much-neededdisinfectant solution through our state's chambers of commerce and industry associations. These supplies will be available to small businesses with50 or fewer employees.Businesses will be able to pick up a month's supply of face coverings as well as a voucher for a gallon of disinfectant that can be purchased from any RI Ocean State Job Lot store.
To obtain these supplies, businesses must show they've completed their [COVID-19 control plan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018aHL85e3Q85EwyC6ft9KnuhlTkasMk-LJYLiexOaAe616oPBz_KGeXCXB-VUrPTAJ7YSDU6irm1dMtKA2bMiBuBMyrrSKgV5IoEkfNVMizlVK2_7r3ydmvzDba8yMRXi-OhCwjp6oajGGpZBCyFJcumIQ042Ww2jcLOtXESioNDpqNT65t0qSXHKKeeyCNdylTgsJsVn4CahbctfesaALNdzILO_EvXjXDTJ2SfRHgZz4l0H5J8e0A==&c=m7D2Ql_VpXacHKGYzZ6_7L0g6tAoNFmOr7DDpjnGjKUDNeK2jd_sPQ==&ch=F1xVrC8o9iyZPbiW7-vxV6xrStegP0GA9X4oZFTyr1FCrJJtUMyItQ==), which details what they will do to prevent the spread of COVID-19 in their businesses. As we move towards getting Rhode Islanders back to work, these supplies will help to get folks back on their feet.
I'm also proud to announce that thanks to a generous donation from the Microsoft Corporation, we have 500 laptops available for Rhode Island small businesses with fewer than 25 employees.This will help these small businesses make improvements to their operations, increase their revenue, or to promote additional opportunities for remote work. We will prioritize small businesses that are owned by the communities who have been hardest hit by this crisis: people of color, women, veterans or low and moderate income individuals. Applications are available on [CommerceRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018aHL85e3Q85EwyC6ft9KnuhlTkasMk-LJYLiexOaAe616oPBz_KGeXCXB-VUrPTAlmAGIHBEy-5KEH_g1a5AM6GplfC1LY8PgW5r-pVvAdHQ9vua4E8YrVqEJDiYHoplkF2j2YVeiVecyuN27Hw3NHRbDAiX_WtsfsLd625ZYq0t1EJ8Bfzuhw==&c=m7D2Ql_VpXacHKGYzZ6_7L0g6tAoNFmOr7DDpjnGjKUDNeK2jd_sPQ==&ch=F1xVrC8o9iyZPbiW7-vxV6xrStegP0GA9X4oZFTyr1FCrJJtUMyItQ==) in both English and Spanish and are due on May 26.
---
|
---
| Of course, in order for us to begin reopening Rhode Island's businesses, we need to continue expanding our testing capacity. In the past week, we've ramped up symptomatic testing capacity in our hardest hit communities. We launched a new site at the Rhode Island Free Clinic in Providence and tripled our testing capacity in Woonsocket.
We are still seeing high positivity rates in many of these communities which means two things: we need to continue expanding our capacity and we need to do a better job of spreading the word and encouraging people to get tested. Anyone can call The Point, our multilingual support hotline, to get connected with information and resources about quarantine and isolation. Call them 24/7 at 401-462-4444.
If you have symptoms, please get tested. I want you to know that testing is safe and secure and that supports are available for you and your family in the event that you do have the coronavirus.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018aHL85e3Q85EwyC6ft9KnuhlTkasMk-LJYLiexOaAe616oPBz_KGeXCXB-VUrPTAzUClXNfP3BR37beGsb8Y7jRwm4yVl6YdNk9GM3WrIKCB5h2dfHLi49ElaiIZz6OLEo7M9QrhqR4Dv-oMoAyNT5vXwTWoKTV_9nuOGUcvH16e2w64utJaQngrWa1PXldZZ7RADPPvxK3thMhI7g2pXUFO-JyoNAjsf9foGr_u2aziLI0JXyaaGYS71tbAR-h5Ts4dudQWZElg_EZKgN74WqLkEQ2UEfIju2WbHsAFTRwoN7w3ChrgFBpE_6Ad3dep8Ef2oU9fUNY=&c=m7D2Ql_VpXacHKGYzZ6_7L0g6tAoNFmOr7DDpjnGjKUDNeK2jd_sPQ==&ch=F1xVrC8o9iyZPbiW7-vxV6xrStegP0GA9X4oZFTyr1FCrJJtUMyItQ==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=b3e32d38-18ae-4d00-ab90-ae1c5b157188)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=b3e32d38-18ae-4d00-ab90-ae1c5b157188) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Common Sense, for the Common Good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17486024/196071701/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmMzOTFkOS1lNDk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFXCYwL2BSok5WVnzOXK2njRmo5G4kIo4FD0ZGR2qvU=&emci=5c6af6fe-1195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ffc391d9-e495-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10438639)

Dear Friend, With over 80,000 Americans dead, and more than 30 million out of work, the impact of COVID-19 have been devastating. The lack of preparedness and divisiveness in our response - a stunning failure of the most basic responsibility of government. Despite the administration's hollow declarations of victory and calls to get back to normal, the virus is still with us, and our capacity to manage it has grown only minimally. There is no back to normal, only forward to a new normal. Let's shape our new normal together. A new normal in which we don't offer up our senior citizens as human sacrifices to revive the economy. A new normal in which everyone has access to health care regardless of employment status. A new normal in which we invest in education, infrastructure, and preparedness so that we're ready for every challenge thrown at us. It's time for Central Texans and all Americans to shock the political class, to overcome the gerrymandering and the dark money, to stand up and scream that we're done with the status quo. **Let's get back to common sense, for the common good.[Please pitch in if you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17486025/196071757/-1907457919?refcode=051420_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmMzOTFkOS1lNDk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFXCYwL2BSok5WVnzOXK2njRmo5G4kIo4FD0ZGR2qvU=). name: John Hutchison for Supreme Court
subject: Protecting our West Virginia Communities
body:
Public safety, the preservation of constitutional rights, and implementation of justice demand that we keep the judicial system moving effectively. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17486829/196088196/-1172787226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDRmMmIzOC1lYjk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EnYmtxaSvwY8-W1pWe3iyeEgF02z5P51Ts36cx5P4rA=&emci=3291747b-9495-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=704f2b38-eb95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4846285) |
---|---
| Dear Friend: While the COVID-19 crisis has caused the closure our schools and churches and disrupted many of our routine activities, it has not stopped criminals from comitting crimes, children from being abused, and people from being the victims of domestic violence. **As a member of the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals, it has been John Hutchison’s responsibility to make sure the wheels of justice continue to turn.** When individuals in one of our courthouses tested positive for the coronavirus, the Court acted quickly to put procedures in place to utilize video conferencing and telecommunications to protect our citizens. Justice Hutchison’s 24 years as a circuit court judge and 18 months as a justice on the Supreme Court of Appeals have uniquely prepared him to help the courts meet these challenges. Public safety, the preservation of constitutional rights, and implementation of justice demand that we keep the judicial system moving effectively. As we move forward out of this crisis we need leaders with experience to provide stability and guidance as we navigate an economic recovery. Please make a donation today. Let’s get John across the finish line. Let’s Keep Justice John Hutchison on the WV Supreme Court of Appeals. [__**Make a donation and Keep Our Supreme Court on the right path.**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17486830/196088197/-1882588567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDRmMmIzOC1lYjk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EnYmtxaSvwY8-W1pWe3iyeEgF02z5P51Ts36cx5P4rA=&emci=3291747b-9495-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=704f2b38-eb95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4846285) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17486831/196088198/-1882588567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDRmMmIzOC1lYjk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EnYmtxaSvwY8-W1pWe3iyeEgF02z5P51Ts36cx5P4rA=&emci=3291747b-9495-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=704f2b38-eb95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4846285)

Team,

**Today, President Trump is visiting Pennsylvania in the hopes of keeping PA red this November -- and that includes propping up Scott Perry right here in PA-10.**

The race to represent this district is going to set the stage for what happens statewide. Flipping this district blue is absolutely critical to the efforts to ensure Pennsylvania goes blue in 2020.

The people of PA-10 deserve someone who will go to bat for them in Congress. Eugene has a proven track record of fighting for hardworking Pennsylvanians, and he’ll do the same in Congress. But we need to make sure we have the resources to send him there.

[**Will you chip in any amount right now to help us meet our mid-month goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17487624/196096230/460726911?&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.05.14_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=47a97b86-ed95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2E5N2I4Ni1lZDk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OF4XIy2T_510HK3Mijgzn0xufV_yQKobBV2sXEW4R4c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Donate $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17487625/196096231/460726911?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2020.05.14_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=47a97b86-ed95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2E5N2I4Ni1lZDk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OF4XIy2T_510HK3Mijgzn0xufV_yQKobBV2sXEW4R4c=)

name: Team Messner
subject: You're invited! Join us today.

body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8d7be90cfff82462/720e2dcad83c09ecc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Do you want a chance to talk to Corky and find out more about how he’s going to win the Republican primary, then defeat Jeanne Shaheen? **We are holding a tele-town hall today and Corky wants you to be there**. With the current pandemic, we've changed to tele-town hall events. It’s important for Corky to keep you up-to-date on all the latest developments in this race, and give you the opportunity to ask him any questions you may have. **Today at 6:30 P.M., we’re hosting a LIVE _Granite State Conversations_ tele-town hall meeting, with a particular focus on Northern New Hampshire! **

It's easy to join in. Just take these two simple steps:
1. [**Tap or click here to RSVP**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8d7be90cfff82462/7066c8d153bbd9e3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
2. Call in at 6:30 P.M. to join. The phone number is (603) 506-4097.

Corky will be talking about the upcoming race to flip this seat RED by defeating career politician Jeanne Shaheen, and how we’ve shifted our campaign strategy to win while dealing with the COVID-19 crisis. **Don’t forget that this in an interactive event, so please bring your questions for Corky!** We’ll see you there - **[Follow this link to RSVP now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8d7be90cfff82462/cd3012d876e11091c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** -Team Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8d7be90cfff82462/3e3d4c0759dc2883c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8d7be90cfff82462/1284468b1d853109c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Gun sense should be automatic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friends, When I was little, my dad was a game warden. We spent the weekends hunting and fishing, and hunting rifles were a constant presence. I'm no stranger to guns or to the critical importance of gun safety. That's why I am so proud to be recognized as a 2020 Gun Sense Candidate by Moms Demand Action! The recent armed protests outside the Ohio Statehouse and throughout the country were a stark reminder that high capacity weapons are easy to access and can be used for fear, intimidation, and worse. I respect the Second Amendment but I also will continue to fight for common sense measures, like background checks and red flag laws, which keep our communities and our children safe. Meanwhile, my opponent feels the opposite, even refusing to sign a basic proclamation for National Gun Violence Awareness Day. When asked, "who could be against safety?" my opponent's response was that Moms Demand Action is _" a very political and an NRA-bashing organization out of Chicago." _ **_Safety shouldn 't be up for debate._** _**We must **__**act to stop violence. We must protect our children.**_ Please make a contribution today. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gRW4e55q5USJ_18Cb2nDXbJlUdRaXXQP2Ol-D3Logk8=/TOzYZLDFSmeLFeEYl8FAksw4xa68pY4Q7TbjkWw63vA=?refcode=MDA)

| Friends, Check out a pair of great Op-Eds from a pair of great Senators - Jeb Bradley and Regina Birdsell. \- NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |

|

|
---
New Hampshire's Phased Reopening
by Jeb Bradley
May 8, 2020

Last week, Gov. Chris Sununu announced revisions to New Hampshire’s stay-at-home order that will allow some currently closed business to reopen. The phased reopening comes as well over 100,000 New Hampshire citizens are unemployed, as are 30 million Americans. Gov. Sununu is taking a cautious approach that balances the continued need for public health safety against the dire circumstances so many hard-working families and businesses find themselves in.

Starting immediately, New Hampshire’s 26 hospitals can resume treating patients for time-sensitive procedures. For almost two months, patients have not been able to access needed care for anything other than an emergency in order to preserve hospital capacity to treat the expected surge of virus patients. That surge, thankfully, did not occur as the number of hospitalizations for COVID-19 has leveled off at slightly over 100 patients in New Hampshire. With the governor’s order, hospitals can resume procedures such as CT scans, MRIs, joint replacements and biopsies. Hospitals will have to segregate COVID-19 patients from others and restrict visitors. This is welcome news for patients. A recent article in the New England Journal of Medicine by Dr. Lisa Rosenbaum outlined the risks for non COVID-19 patients who have not had normal care for almost two months. She wrote, “Cancer care, which often involves immunosuppressive therapy, tumor resection, and inpatient treatment, has been disproportionately affected by COVID-19.”

The governor’s order is good news for furloughed hospital employees who can begin to return to work. But two long-term questions will have to be answered. Has our health-care delivery system been undermined by the financial impact to healt- care institutions? Will the lack of care for two months that patients have experienced have a profound impact on the nation’s overall health? The governor’s order also allows some New Hampshire businesses to begin the process of reopening. Starting Monday, retail stores that have been closed can reopen. Employees and customers will be expected to wear a mask, and the number of people at any one time in a store cannot exceed 50 percent of the store’s capacity as determined by fire codes.

Hair salons and barbershops will be able to reopen on a reservation-only basis. Both the customer and the employee will need to also wear a mask and there will be distancing and sanitizing requirements.

State parks and golf courses can reopen with the exception of beaches that are state parks. Golf courses will only be open to members or New Hampshire residents but will not be able to open their club house restaurants except for takeout. The governor’s order allows campgrounds to remain open to either members or New Hampshire residents. Access to common areas of the campground will be restricted and distancing within the campground required. I remain concerned about open campgrounds, as do many public safety and municipal officials. Hopefully the restriction for New Hampshire residents will minimize the risk of virus spread. Restaurants will be able to do a limited opening starting May 18. To begin with, the only seating allowed will be outdoors with a maximum of six people at a table and tables at least 6 feet apart. Staff will have to wear masks. The task force appointed by the governor to produce guidance on reopening will continue to meet as many other business categories need to be taken into account. Those businesses range from other health-care providers like dentists, to hotels and large venues. As we approach the short summer season, it’s vital that we get these businesses open both successfully and safely. It will be critical that New Hampshire continue to show progress in containing the virus. Testing for the virus and acquisition of protective gear are moving in the right direction. Nearly 27,000 virus tests have been conducted and the state is on track to complete 1500 tests per day. Individuals are able to schedule antibody tests to determine if they have contracted the virus. Hospitalization rates for COVID-19 will need to continue to remain stable. With more testing the percentage of positive tests will need to continue to decline. All of us will have to continue to practice the appropriate discipline of distancing, wearing masks and good hygiene. With continued progress, the phased reopening of New Hampshire can and should continue. We must prioritize both safety and economic viability of New Hampshire’s hard-working people and small businesses. We can do both together and the governor’s order is a good first step. Please keep safe and healthy and if you have any questions or concerns, don’t hesitate to contact me at [(603) 387-2365](tel:\(603\) 387-2365). Jeb Bradley is a Republican state senator from Wolfeboro.

---
|
---
BIRDSELL: Elections By Mail Aren’t Good Solution for Granite State
By Regina Birdsell May 5, 2020 In recent weeks as the country has been dealing with the outbreak of COVID-19, I’ve become increasingly concerned with organizations and Congress who are pushing for mail-in voting. This would federalize our elections allowing Washington to dictate the terms of our elections. Mail-in Voting or Vote by Mail is different than voting by absentee ballot. In order to receive an absentee ballot, a voter must take the initiative to request one for a specific reason. With mail-in voting, on the other hand, the municipality would send out a ballot to every person listed on the checklist. There are several problems with this process. First, there needs to be a cleanup of our voter rolls. According to an article by Hans von Spakovsky, an attorney and a former member of the [Federal Election Commission](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIwOTMyMTc5ODI2ODQwNjczJmM9YTN1MyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDc4NjAzOTAmZD1pOXE2cjJl.-7hdVzhfvU0Zk60rs01vo7e_03Y7MgZrvZ5MFFBWX1M) (FEC), “state voter registration lists across the country are notoriously inaccurate and out-of-date, with many jurisdictions having duplicate or triplicate registrations, registrants who have died, and registrations lacking full address data. Some counties in the United States have more registered voters than voting-age citizens.” In New Hampshire, some Supervisors of the Checklist clean up the rolls. However, New Hampshire law only mandates they purge the checklist once every ten years, which almost certainly means ballots being mailed to New Hampshire addresses where voters have moved or passed away. It’s easy to imagine a new resident receiving a ballot at their new address, one that is not addressed to them. Will the throw it out? Or will they fill it out? There is nothing to prevent individuals from casting ballots that do not belong to them. Election officials are no longer even allowed to match signatures of mail-in absentee ballots to ensure that the person who filled it out was the registered voter. Currently, there is no other way to match registered voters with their mailed-in absentee ballot. States relying on this process may send piles of ballots to obsolete addresses or to registrants who have died. According to Spakovsky, California voter rolls are tainted with thousands of deceased registrants, as well as voters who say they live at commercial addresses. In Swissvale, Pennsylvania, one man had seven simultaneous active voter registrations at the same address. An all-mail election would send seven ballots to this house. It is often the low income and elderly who are preyed upon with this method. For instance, in Rio Grande Valley, politicos roam preying on the most vulnerable voters and voting their ballots for them. In Cameron County, Texas, nine politicos were charged with voter fraud related to mail ballots. Another problem with elections by mail is missing ballots. In an article by _RealClearPolitics_ , it states, “between 2012 and 2018, 28.3 million mail-in ballots remain unaccounted for according to data from the federal Election Assistance Commission.” That number is undoubtedly higher when you figure Chicago and other municipalities across the country never responded to their request. While there is no proof the ballots were used fraudulently, the numbers were enough to concern the Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF). In a _New York Times_ article from 2012, it noted voter fraud involving mail-in balloting “is vastly more prevalent than the in-person voting fraud that has attracted far more attention.” The concerns about mail-in voting fraud were serious enough that in a 2008 report produced by the CalTech/MIT Voting Technology Project, its recommendation to states “restrict or abolish on-demand absentee voting in favor of in-person early voting.” Even with these concerns, five states — Oregon, Washington, Colorado, Utah and Hawaii — hold all-mail elections. However, PILF obtained voter data from Oregon, the first state to adopt this method for the 2012 and 2018 elections, and when the data was compared to the census data, they found 871,000 ballots of the 7 million sent out, were unaccounted for. Interestingly enough, Oregon would not reveal their data for the 2014 and 2016 elections for reasons the state would not disclose. The next concern is “ballot harvesting.” If there is a significant increase in mail-in voting this fall, expect to see more ballot harvesting, a practice where third parties collect these mail-in ballots on behalf of voters and deliver them to election officials. Thankfully, “ballot harvesting” is illegal in most states, as well as in New Hampshire. But it was most notably used in North Carolina and California. In North Carolina, a GOP operative was indicted for crimes related to ballot harvesting, and in California observers say ballot harvesting played a key role in ousting several Republican candidates in longstanding GOP strongholds. The population is much more transient today and there is no way for election officials to reliably get ballots to millions of people every election cycle. Mail-in ballots to all voters is an open invitation to fraud and something I do not think New Hampshire should support. I believe our absentee ballot system, even with its flaws, is a much better way to help those who want to vote and have concerns with in-person voting during this COVID-19 era.

In 2016, the Republican incumbent won the district by a 19% margin. In 2018, our campaign stepped up, brought our people-first message to this district, and held McCaul to just 51%! clean_body: Peter, This campaign has done some amazing things. We took a district that everyone had written off as a “solid red” seat and completely flipped the script. In 2016, the Republican incumbent won the district by a 19% margin. In 2018, our campaign stepped up, brought our people-first message to this district, and held McCaul to just 51%! Now, we have our chance to finish the job. = = = = = = Michael McCaul is scared. He didn’t expect such a close race from us last election because he thought he had this district bought and paid for — he was wrong. Now, he’s trying to make up for the 16 years he’s taken this seat for granted, but it’s too late. The people are ready for a change. Our campaign is about fighting for workers, families, students, seniors — the everyday people who make up our communities. I don’t take corporate PAC money. I don’t pay expensive DC consultants. I rely on people like you and me to fund this grassroots campaign. And it’s working — our campaign has more donations from inside our district than McCaul, the wealthiest member of Congress! The people want a change and we are ready to give it to them. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Victory in the Supreme Court!
body:
One step closer to getting Wisconsin back open for business... No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear friend,Victory! Today, we're one step closer to**safely getting Wisconsin back open for business** after a win in the Wisconsin Supreme Court, who ruled against our liberal Governor's rampant abuses of power.As you know, we recently took Governor Evers to court over his sweeping actions to **shut down Wisconsin and keep our residents on lockdown** without an end in sight.Today, the Supreme Court agreed that Tony Evers **denied the people of Wisconsin a voice** through this obvious overreach. [Join Fitz - Stop liberal overreach!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-y/) We've heard the public outcry as our liberal governor keeps our state at a standstill, and**Wisconsinites are forced to sit by with no voice in the process. **This victory in the Supreme Court brings us one step closer to safely reopening our state, but the fight isn't over. I'll be working hard to continue to** hold the line against abuses of power **and get our residents, businesses, and our economy through this crisis.**I hope I can count on your support to continue the fight against liberal overreach.** [Contribute Online - Click Here!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-j/)
### Whether here in Wisconsin or in our Nation's Capital, you can always count on me to fight for our **conservative values of freedom and liberty.**
### Thanks,
Scott FitzgeraldP.S., If you live in the 5th Congressional District and you haven't already done so, please head to my [website](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-t/) and print and sign a copy of my nomination papers to help make sure that we get on the ballot. Here's the link once more to [support our campaign online](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-i/). Thanks again!
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**
• Forward This Email To Friends
• Facebook: FitzgeraldForWI
• Twitter: FitzgeraldForWI | [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-d/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-h/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntjik-ahkdjtlkr-u/)

Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
PO Box 102
Juneau, WI 53039

name: Dr. Chuck Dietzen
subject: Have you requested your ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
✅ MAY 21 DEADLINE: Take action if you’re planning to vote by mail in the GOP primary!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/832e83476566cc51/620be0bc96549915c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, We’re hard at work winning the support of Fifth District Republicans, and the primary election is now just 19 days away. Victory or defeat will all come down to turnout... _I’m counting on EVERY supporter to cast their ballot!_ If you’re planning to vote by mail – and haven’t requested an absentee ballot yet – please take a moment to do so today. Every registered voter is eligible to vote by mail in this election. **The deadline to request a ballot is coming up fast next Thursday, May 21st.** **[Visit Indiana's Secretary of State website to get your application.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/832e83476566cc51/0656e97f6885a818c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** My team has done an amazing job of adapting during these trying times. We’re in unchartered territory when it comes to running a 21st century political campaign during a pandemic... but I am confident we are doing everything we can to reach and win over voters online, by phone, and by mail. Thank you for ALL your support in this race. We’re not taking our foot off the gas for a minute. Again, if you’re planning to vote by mail, make sure to get in your application for an absentee ballot! \- Dr. Chuck [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/832e83476566cc51/50b2b117ecb6ebedc3d6b838967d376c/33363) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/832e83476566cc51/9adc864e221023d9c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/832e83476566cc51/6d5434bd5144b631c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

We’re in unchartered territory when it comes to running a 21st century political campaign during a pandemic... but I am confident we are doing everything we can to reach and win over voters online, by phone, and by mail. Thank you for ALL your support in this race. We’re not taking our foot off the gas for a minute. Again, if you’re planning to vote by mail, make sure to get in your application for an absentee ballot! \- Dr. Chuck | | | ---|--- id:2020-05-05-16:10:36:619t Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc.

| Derek, In the latest **[Nancy Pelosi pork-ridden spending bill](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIwOTU5NzcwOTU2Nzk3MTc5JmM9ZjhsNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDc4NzY5NjgmZD1uNWczeThw.dj2MRCLTdPV1IC1bH2TrQtlasAtDdNtslp4ZSgIMzOA)** , Democrats want to use YOUR New Hampshire tax dollars to subsidize income tax revenues in New York, California, and other liberal states.

| This is a clear case of Democrats trying to take advantage of a crisis and use Granite Staters' hard-earned tax dollars to prop up other states that were poorly-run long before this current crisis hit. Granite Staters shouldn't be subsidizing other state's income tax revenues, and we need to send a clear message to our Federal Delegation that we're ready to [flip their seats](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIwOTU5NzcwOTU2Nzk3MTc5JmM9ZjhsNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDc4NzY5NzQmZD15OWEyejNx.O-ZmPMKtgUuTfMa6fLB21ochejvXACCxPJ90rUi5Bpw) this November. You can donate to our efforts to [defeat these three Democrats at once](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDIwOTU5NzcwOTU2Nzk3MTc5JmM9ZjhsNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDc4NzY5ODQmZD1iMGEzbTNo.ZzTg8qL6fktWPW5qjdYcVFE4Y0-B7X2lqeBHUxzklL0), or you can donate to whichever fund you want to specifically target.

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Introducing the My Faith Votes Podcast
body:
| | Peter, We could all use some uplifting content right about now. Between all the political news and coronavirus impact, it’s easy to feel discouraged. Yet as Christians, we have a reason for great hope; and we have the opportunity to make a difference through our faith. That’s why we launched the My faith Votes Podcast. You can listen to engaging conversations with guest influencers like Allen Jackson, Mike Huckabee, and Abby Johnson and be encouraged. We talk about how to bring the influence of our faith into everything we do, especially politics. [Listen in](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200514com01&n=1) and be challenged to pray, think, and vote from a biblical perspective. And check out the other latest content from My Faith Votes this week to stay informed. | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200514com01&n=2) | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MpLeVYFcgVnLYVWCIxzC6VQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200514com01&n=3)

name: John Cornyn
subject: BETO is back!!
body:
Friend, I thought Texas was DONE with Beto. But I suppose I was wrong.
Beto is back.
In a recent event, the gun-grabbin, Green New Dealin failed presidential candidate headlined an event with Joe Biden with one purpose and one purpose only:
_**Securing the Far-Left's pipe dream of flipping our state a deep, dark, destructive BLUE.**_ [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV0zEJhObOBwjr6qO9AEaxvxm3ij6oYQxzyRBbV5xVE8QrdjHQDRQWWOh8Wt_MqI60HHk5VRl5OwCPcR5LqsTkJMHaN2_lDuZ8h0_YFWET0YiS25E6A2A-qorM776yZiZbMjXjHZH1vso_aBoT5nw8SS8j7si_6sZwPryOqiVaJMjtExCIkgFR8Stox3pzx_BWBPoAyCNbsq78V4PPlkMyhT8HBUo-AJk3hjc-MYqkOaQgP6505oTWazUo5IXY2DqgIgN4dBVz07HWVZIudrKEKwzBPZwDozbjb0_BfD4_xzZFHV6PYIPxMU=&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==) Beto and Biden represent the exact opposite of what it means to be a Texan.
They want to crush our Second Amendment rights, rounding up every firearm in the state. They want to upend the Texas energy industry, killing jobs and increasing our dependency on foreign energy.
Friend, if we fail to stand in firm rejection of what they're trying to do to our state our country we'll be handing them a free pass. **[Will you do your part and tell Beto and Biden NOT TO MESS WITH RED TEXAS?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV0zEJhObOBwjr6qO9AEaxvxm3ij6oYQxzyRBbV5xVE8QrdjHQDRQWWOh8Wt_MqI60HHk5VRl5OwCPcR5LqsTkJMHaN2_lDuZ8h0_YFWET0YiS25E6A2A-qorM776yZiZbMjXjHZH1vso_aBoT5nw8SS8j7si_6sZwPryOqiVaJMjtExCIkgFR8Stox3pzx_BWBPoAyCNbsq78V4PPlkMyhT8HBUo-AJk3hjc-MYqkOaQgP6505oTWazUo5IXY2DqgIgN4dBVz07HWVZIudrKEKwzBPZwDozbjb0_BfD4_xzZetpP_PUrAFM=&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==)** [**STOP BETO O'ROURKE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV0zEJhObOBwjr6qO9AEaxvxm3ij6oYQxzyRBbV5xVE8QrdjHQDRQWWOh8Wt_MqI60HHk5VRl5OwCPcR5LqsTkJMHaN2_lDuZ8h0_YFWET0YiS25E6A2A-qorM776yZiZbMjXjHZH1vso_aBoT5nw8SS8j7si_6sZwPryOqiVaJMjtExCIkgFR8Stox3pzx_BWBPoAyCNbsq78V4PPlkMyhT8HBUo-AJk3hjc-MYqkOaQgP6505oTWazUo5IXY2DqgIgN4dBVz07HWVZIudrKEKwzBPZwDozbjb0_BfD4_xzZGKg1_Lz9_gc=&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==) [**STOP JOE BIDEN**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV0zEJhObOBwjr6qO9AEaxvxm3ij6oYQxzyRBbV5xVE8QrdjHQDRQWWOh8Wt_MqI60HHk5VRl5OwCPcR5LqsTkJMHaN2_lDuZ8h0_YFWET0YiS25E6A2A-qorM776yZiZbMjXjHZH1vso_aBoT5nw8SS8j7si_6sZwPryOqiVaJMjtExCIkgFR8Stox3pzx_BWBPoAyCNbsq78V4PPlkMyhT8HBUo-AJk3hjc-MYqkOaQgP6505oTWazUo5IXY2DqgIgN4dBVz07HWVZIudrKEKwzBPZwDozbjb0_BfD4_xzZUxK0oD6_WT8=&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==) I want Joe Biden to realize what a big mistake it was to parade Beto around Texas. I want him to realize that Texans like you and I are NOT with him and his dangerous liberal agenda. John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV3dWX5TjArBM3nQZ9ocs2_toZAuEkz0w9DHDvAmMZ77-P4CoPDjDPVHZqUHcbK4jGjZmMmPqKs1k5pBTvO-2Vz149CBVkzGPFBo1gIDr1F1Qlox5Jn1V8Dw=&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==) and [Twitter ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV0zEJhObOBwjSacJrPdX1OSlceddwT8BrX-K0T8O0VToEypZe4_YOkEOSjM3VP1TaFfVpiijU2LYHZk_v7y7gojlbcXd6V_CLeZ5yi_YGyPd&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==)that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV3dWX5TjArBMBs21pSjds_PlaR7nTc-Gzy53OuEbIUFtGWnUEm6us-5nqLqAS-9myOa1orO0QUnU7jT19LWcGsUQoi5oirP8FApwZOJC4Dvbi08jsLxLRw49Mjtn6r-RUg==&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oNWVc14NtWKLKAmfpeG4RYWz8PJft2Svj4p0jwPPUjXgmsYuUqatV0XK-UNlUywGh1yRCI8Ntvpsy4fQjRSpnTndf5Y1H1w7pTYkWl3lT9r5Dv_8H_Wo7kTMLXLFtm4f-SuPwOoI9Kq486qFUTLBpMzxRAExznWLY04_kWXp1KUN5JRvVvdijqMZt293w-qnaaZHXK6FJBQoduxkgWnUwGHzqsEqo3B6h3CBvaQL31EkZCmY3vjpVrUHEpy8XzXJ6t_UY7JNAmfHd3JUST9NorXRhOD0D6g9YeUEobE7jOpZMz4rovQQxQ==&c=UNClS0c29vhgMroK7IVr2brsGiy1fjiPy1feWzIuCq-rs-XAd22XIg==&ch=Hz16S8OBN0ckxX9OdGod9E9OeRZQI7XFeZx0X_G0xZyg465CkYMMSw==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. name: Stacey Abrams Alert
subject: we're up against the clock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We need your help to close this gap.
| | |
---
Friend, we were starting to think we were toast.

The GOP was raising MILLIONS to buy this Senate seat in Georgia, and our grassroots support wasn't where it needed to be to fight back.
**But then Stacey Abrams asked you to support this campaign to elect Reverend Warnock ... and donations SKYROCKETED!**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7ac/288179be/b97d242/348e9d5b/2133895958/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTYzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk163-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
But now we're up against another critical midnight deadline - and with time running out, we're still falling incredibly short of our $50,000 goal. We need Democrats like you to act NOW - **or else, we could lose our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. **
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate this November, and _The Washington Post_ __ says winning in Georgia is KEY - but we can only get it done by hitting every single fundraising goal.
Even with Kelly Loeffler (R) flooding this race with $20 million of her own fortune, polling now shows this race in a dead heat. **That 's why we're counting on you to follow Stacey's lead and chip in right now - before time runs out: [_Please, give $5 or more now - as much as you can spare - before midnight tonight to help us win this race, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate!_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7ac/288179be/b97d242/348e9d5b/2133895958/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTYzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk163-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Bill Olson
subject: Our Country Required Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g
- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

Career politicians like Soto have no real world experience. I have risked my life for our country. The story of my life - and my family’s lives- is one of sacrifice for our country, for our safety, for our freedom.

That very sacrifice - protecting my country and our freedoms - is the exact reason I will be a worthy and honorable member of Congress.

I have seen my share of intense situations that have tested my mettle.

I joined the U.S. Army in the early 1980s, training to be an airborne paratrooper. My early duty stations took me to exotic locations such as the Republic of South Korea (close to the DMZ) and to Cold War West Germany, when the Berlin Wall was still up and being guarded by East German machine guns.

Along the way, I served in Special Forces, Engineer, Aviation, Infantry, and JSOC (operations) units.

That prepared me for a great challenge filled with great danger - fighting in Desert Storm for the liberation of Kuwait.

I served in the 1st Infantry Division, fighting along the “Highway of Death”. It was our job to fight and kill Saddam Hussein’s Republican Guard.

I had the unhappy duty to police the battlefield to protect the fallen - graves registration. You never appreciate the horrors of war as you do with that somber task.

We road marched our vehicles all the way to Basra, and after the negotiated peace, it was our job to guard the burning oil fields. I witnessed the dark soot during the day, and the night alight in fire from burning oil. You could smell the death and the burnt oil mixed in the air.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

We were all contaminated with residue, covered with burned petroleum.

However, we took hundreds of POW surrenders - all of them Saddam’s Republican Guard elite soldiers.

That was not the end of my service to the country in times of crisis however.

I happened to be stationed in New York City during 9-11.

If I thought that the burning oilfields of Iraq were a nightmare, being part of the on-the-ground response to these terrorist attacks, took it to a whole new level.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

The cleanup and rescue missions in New York were massive, and operations began immediately. I was once again called on to work for our country.

I wound up being stationed in New York until 2006, in a large number of roles: providing on-the-ground support to FEMA, supporting firefighters in their mission, and assisting all the agencies to get supplies to Ground Zero, where there never seemed to be enough of certain things.

So far, I had an intense and eventful military career. I had risked my life for my country many times, working to defend our people and our way of life.

But I was not done quite yet.

Once more I got the call to deploy, this time to serve in Joint Special Operations Command in Afghanistan - supporting our soldiers in some pretty remote places.

Here, I got to provide logistics to some key operations.

I was able to support the “tip of the spear”, managing logistics for SEAL team 6, as well as all government agencies in country- NSA, FBI, CIA teams.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

My expertise had me handling supplies, equipment, vehicles, and even support some missions I cannot mention on here.

This was no easy task. For my work I was awarded the Bronze Star, which is still one of my most honored possessions, and something I will always cherish.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

After my service, I retired honorably from the military - just in time to see my three sons join the military. I had one son in the Navy, two in the Air Force. They served in Iraq, Japan, and Afghanistan- one on the same base (Bagram) that I had served years before! Pics of me and my boys below.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

So when people ask me, “Bill, what do you bring for experience as you run for Congress?”, I can answer that I have been a part of every major national challenge over the last 30 years.... And I was the one making sure our heroes had what they needed to get the job done.

I have risked my life for our country and I would do it again. That is the depth of my patriotism, the depth of my commitment to the “Land of the Free.”

But now, I face a different challenge - and I need YOUR commitment to help me see it through!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens - whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution - are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream like Nancy Pelosi. I don't have billions of dollars of George Soros or Michael Bloomberg hand outs.

I earned my education in the Cold War outposts of freeom in Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. And I hate to say it, I served on the battlefield of New York City after 9-11. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies and support the President 100% against all enemies foreign and domestic. And there are plenty of domestic enemies, believe me.

Let's be clear - there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance.

Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more freedom, and more Trump - and less crazy liberal career politician Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g
today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President! Here is Soto below chumming it up with Nancy Pelosi:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

The Dems and their media allies are putting out lies. We need to get the REAL truth out too - and for that, canyou help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need to raise an additional $6,900 by the end of this month to pay for the needed advertising!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=giHNiaS59_6OuRU&b=prEJm13JlVovyg0NvtNk_g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district - Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto. Career politicians like Soto have no real world experience. I have risked my life for our country. The story of my life - and my family’s lives- is one of sacrifice for our country, for our safety, for our freedom. That very sacrifice - protecting my country and our freedoms - is the exact reason I will be a worthy and honorable member of Congress. I have seen my share of intense situations that have tested my mettle. I joined the U.S. Army in the early 1980s, training to be an airborne paratrooper. My early duty stations took me to exotic locations such as the Republic of South Korea (close to the DMZ) and to Cold War West Germany, when the Berlin Wall was still up and being guarded by East German machine guns. Along the way, I served in Special Forces, Engineer, Aviation, Infantry, and JSOC (operations) units. That prepared me for a great challenge filled with great danger - fighting in Desert Storm for the liberation of Kuwait. I served in the 1st Infantry Division, fighting along the “Highway of Death”. It was our job to fight and kill Saddam Hussein’s Republican Guard. I had the unhappy duty to police the battlefield to protect the fallen - graves registration. You never appreciate the horrors of war as you do with that somber task. We road marched our vehicles all the way to Basra, and after the negotiated peace, it was our job to guard the burning oil fields. I witnessed the dark soot during the day, and the night alight in fire from burning oil. You could smell the death and the burnt oil mixed in the air. Image We were all contaminated with residue, covered with burned petroleum. However, we took hundreds of POW surrenders - all of them Saddam’s Republican Guard elite soldiers. That was not the end of my service to the country in times of crisis however. I happened to be stationed in New York City during 9-11. I'm reaching out today because as it currently stands, Republicans urgently need your support in the fight for America's future. My team is playing a critical role in strengthening and expanding our Senate Republican Majority so that we can continue delivering on the pro-growth, conservative agenda that Americans want and need.

_As a Marine, proud Hoosier, and now United States Senator, it is my honor to uphold our conservative values and our American principles of freedom and justice. But this year, my responsibilities include something even more important:**to defend the Senate Republican Majority.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, it is my job to **hold the line** and protect Senate Republicans in critical battleground states this November. I need your help to increase our momentum and **stop** the radical far-Left's socialist takeover of our great nation. Are you with us? _
---

name: Sandy Smith
subject: My Opponent Called Trump a "Domestic Enemy"!?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015.

Unlike the Republican establishment, _I stuck with the president - through all the media’s attempts to discredit him._

I am proud of what President Trump has done during his first term, to include his handling of this horrible Coronavirus attack on our country!

If you are proud of our president, as I am, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

My support of the president and my conservative platform of protecting our guns, protecting life, securing the border, and reigning in out of control spending was a major reason I won the Republican primary in March.

Conservative Trump voters in my district voted for me with a whopping 77% of the vote! I won more than 30,000 primary votes in this district - **we are on fire for the President and ready to flip this seat!**

There are many people coming on board with my campaign. I have already been endorsed by _Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows_. Here is a picture of me and Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw)
---

_The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a high-level Democrat in Nancy Pelosi’s congressional socialist army_. He is one of her top lieutenants, and before that, he was a top campaigner for Hillary Clinton against Donald Trump. Taking out Butterfield will deal a massive blow to the anti-American far-left socialist agenda.
[ ](secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/st)
---

I am also honored to have been endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights and Americans for Legal Immigration PAC. **They recognize me as being a staunch defender of our Second Amendment rights and opposing open borders!**

With the way President Trump has masterfully handled the Russia hoax, the impeachment hoax, and now the Coronavirus, he will be reelected in a landslide. The Fake News is begging him to stop his nightly press conferences that are getting him higher approval numbers than any president in recent history.

That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment - Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care.

Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Communist Manifesto and implemented by the Soviet Union!

Can you believe this?!? I can’t! That’s why [I’m asking for your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw) most urgently! Please send whatever amount you can spare to get me over the finish line.

**It is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district** \- which North Carolina’s First District now is! They just redrew the map and took away a bunch of Democrat voters, making this district MUCH more competitive.

[ ](secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/st)
---

As a top anti-Trump attack dog for Pelosi and Hillary, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for the worst assaults on our Constitution the radical activist Democrat Congress has proposed:

• _G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. _

• _He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these! This makes me so angry!_

_• Butterfield voted for open borders, allowing for the Coronavirus and other diseases and crime to flood out country. He doesn’t want a wall and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely – and give them handouts, voting rights, and free college!_

_• He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers! This is straight up anti-American!_

_• G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi! She will be terrified when she loses her top lieutenant when he is defeated in November._

As mentioned above, G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. Yet, read an excerpt from this explanation of why he voted to impeach President Trump. **He called President Trump a domestic enemy!**

“ _President Trump put himself before country and violated his oath of office. The oath I took is clear— I have sworn to support and defend the Constitution against _**all enemies, foreign and domestic**_. Based on the evidence before us, _**I voted in favor of both Articles of Impeachment against Donald J. Trump.**_ No one is above the law_.” – G.K. Butterfield

Why is Butterfield so radical and why does he hate President Trump so much?

_Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger!_

But this year, this district turned into a swing district. **Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield**. They don’t know him, and they are Republicans!

With President Trump having such high favorability, and with my decisive primary win of 77%, and the fact that do-nothing Butterfield has never had a real opponent, we are going to WIN!

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw) I need you to send $15, $35, or $250 right now so that I can meet my goal by the end of this month. This deadline is so critical, and I have no time to lose.

You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi?

Think about it:

_No impeachment. No tax hikes. No socialized medicine. No stifling regulations. No gun confiscations. No infanticide. No gotcha or pork-barrel addons to bills._

To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! _That’s keeping America great_.

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=f.T2XGO32pNxmng&b=s0XEfRtisVoJWar94uR4Bw) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxsLGzMzKyc) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxsLGzMzKyc)

We are truly getting down to crunch time. I never imagined I would be campaigning via Zoom chats and telephone calls, but I made a promise when I started this campaign that I would work hard to earn every vote.
**And one thing we 've learned from these uncertain times is that we need more Democrats in Congress fighting for our communities.**
I've been humbled to receive the support of so many Central New Yorkers, and we're positioning ourselves to come out victorious -- but we need to kick it into another gear to make sure we win.
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking for a donation from you today. Every dollar you give will be MATCHED -- so there's no better time to invest in the movement we're building.**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b439/388db0e9/8cb49d8/609b92f3/3700156659/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUxNF9NaWRNb250aDJfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200514_MidMonth2_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+humbly+asking+for&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200514_MidMonth2_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200514_MidMonth2_U1_X1")

Francis

We're facing a critical midnight deadline, and President Trump and my Republican colleagues are counting on us to reach our ambitious fundraising goal and secure the funds necessary to keep the Senate RED.
I don't usually do this, but with our Senate Majority at risk, I knew I needed to reach out to you today.

Friend, we're facing a critical midnight deadline, and President Trump and my Republican colleagues are counting on us to reach our ambitious fundraising goal and secure the funds necessary to keep the Senate RED.
