name: Booker for Senate
subject: Not a typo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Not a typo |
#
Team -- in a moment, we're going to ask if you can chip in $4 to help flip the Senate come this November. No, that's not a typo. Here's why we're asking: Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate majority and get back to the business of fighting for policies that make the lives of everyday Americans better. For years, we've watched this sacred institution wield its power to protect politicians, special interests and corporate PACs -- it's time to get it back to working for the people. **Right now, polls are showing that Democrats are surging in critical swing states like Colorado, North Carolina, Arizona, Kentucky, Montana, and more. That 's great news! But this far out from election day, anything could happen - we need to make sure we're doing everything we can today to flip the Senate come November.** [**Will you make a donation of just $4 today, one for each Senate seat we need to flip for Democrats to win back the majority? We have a major mid-month deadline coming up in just two days, and your contribution could help us stay on track to hit our (very important!) monthly goal.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e0b/5fca0d19/7dd9a9c2/291d7ea3/2299953590/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDUxNC00LWZvci00In0%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200514-4-for-4?refcode=cab-em-200514-4-for-4&amount=4") | [DONATE](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e0b/5fca0d19/7dd9a9c2/291d7ea2/2299953590/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDUxNC00LWZvci00In0%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200514-4-for-4?refcode=cab-em-200514-4-for-4&amount=4")
---
Republicans are sure to pour their resources into every state to play defense and try to keep power in the Senate, especially as the chances of Democrats taking back the majority grow by the day. They've already started airing television and digital ads targeted at strong Democratic contenders.
We know that Cory is hard at work in the Senate doing his best to get as many people as possible the help they need during these uncertain times, and that's why this team is doing everything we can to make sure we build the movement that will keep him there.
**Now we can take our influence even further, but only if we work together and start today.**
[**If you 're financially able, consider chipping in $4 today -- just $1 for each seat Democrats need to flip to take back the majority in the Senate this November.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e0b/5fca0d19/7dd9a9c2/291d7ea3/2299953590/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDUxNC00LWZvci00In0%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200514-4-for-4?refcode=cab-em-200514-4-for-4&amount=4")
[DONATE](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e0b/5fca0d19/7dd9a9c2/291d7ea2/2299953590/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDUxNC00LWZvci00In0%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200514-4-for-4?refcode=cab-em-200514-4-for-4&amount=4")
---
Thanks for all you do as a critical member of this team. We hope you're taking care of yourself and your loved ones, and we appreciate you even reading this email.
Booker for Senate

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

"" | "" Republicans are sure to pour their resources into every state to play defense and try to keep power in the Senate, especially as the chances of Democrats taking back the majority grow by the day. They've already started airing television and digital ads targeted at strong Democratic contenders. We know that Cory is hard at work in the Senate doing his best to get as many people as possible the help they need during these uncertain times, and that's why this team is doing everything we can to make sure we build the movement that will keep him there. Now we can take our influence even further, but only if we work together and start today. "" "" Thanks for all you do as a critical member of this team. We hope you're taking care of yourself and your loved ones, and we appreciate you even reading this email. Booker for Senate PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE ""

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Let's put Brooklyn's working families first
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/IB5WrSv7F02-qfGMCNaJDyQ_1qVPh09D6pm1FQny1_w=)

Peter,

With just under six weeks to go until Primary Day on June 23rd, every single minute counts towards mobilizing our people-powered movement -- **[and so does every single grassroots contribution, no matter how small.](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/nVu8DQEBEJ5KDFXLY_72jz6wsbWpdiZKHDtQ8_AKhCw=)**

Over the past year, we've grown this campaign with small-dollar donations from folks like you. **[And whether it's $5, $10, or $15, you can feel proud knowing that any amount you give today will make a real difference in our fight to bring lasting change to our communities.](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/nVu8DQEBEJ5KDFXLY_72jz6wsbWpdiZKHDtQ8_AKhCw=)** As a supporter, you'll never have to wonder whether your voice is being heard, or whether it's being drowned out by the corporate interests that bought political influence with their PAC money -- but the same can't be said for Rep. Clarke.

******[MAKE A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/nVu8DQEBEJ5KDFXLY_72jz6wsbWpdiZKHDtQ8_AKhCw=)******

Throughout her time in Congress, Rep. Clarke has accepted hundreds of thousands of dollars from telecommunications executives, real estate lobbyists, the healthcare industry, and more. She's raked in donations from Spectrum, even as workers are engaged in the nation's longest-running strike, and she's taken money from Sinclair Broadcasting Group, the pro-Trump media company. And when asked about whether or not she believes that accepting corporate contributions presents a conflict of interest, Rep. Clarke has said, "if that is a determination of how you vote or how you shape policy, then it's definitely a conflict."

Brooklyn's working families don't want vague, evasive answers -- they want to know that lawmakers can be trusted to always put their needs first. Rep. Clarke may not be able to make that promise, but I can. **[So chip in just $3, $5, $10, or whatever you can today, and let's put Brooklyn families first.](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/nVu8DQEBEJ5KDFXLY_72jz6wsbWpdiZKHDtQ8_AKhCw=)**

Best,
Adem

* * *

******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/nVu8DQEBEJ5KDFXLY_72jz6wsbWpdiZKHDtQ8_AKhCw=)******

******[BECOME A VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/QwqE560tl3rCiMmhDGc88AtjWGHrOBbJMeTsWvTQuQk=)******

******[VISIT OUR WEBSITE](https://act.myngp.com/el/27ttizD6s6_bMPdUsI6vff0qzZcxZA4Qf8_1TqMEw7M=/vDKoR-G6YkWRkatErZAA87E9E2t4LN9pKl53LMX8ReI=)******

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Reproductive rights at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | | | **ADD YOUR NAME:
[_FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE GOP ATTACKS ON REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d30b/3d199a51/2f48748e/7364c56a/971052107/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200513p_s")**
---
The Trump Administration and Republicans are carrying out an unprecedented assault on reproductive freedom and women's health care at a time when Americans are relying on access to health care more than ever.
Here's the latest: There are TWO GOP-orchestrated cases before the Supreme Court that could devastate women's health care:
1. The Supreme Court is hearing a case that could allow **employers and universities to refuse to provide coverage for birth control** on the basis of personal religious objections.

2. There's another case before the Supreme Court that could pave the way for extreme and medically unnecessary abortion restrictions that would effectively **gut the protections laid out in _Roe v. Wade_ and ban abortion in our country.**

[_**The assault on _Roe v. Wade_ and women's health care is dangerous and it defies the wishes of the vast majority of Americans who do not want to see _Roe_ overturned. We need to join forces and unequivocally condemn these attacks. Will you sign our emergency petition?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d30b/3d199a51/2f48748e/7364c56b/971052107/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200513p_ns")
From the legal attacks on reproductive rights to the attempts to defund Planned Parenthood, the Trump administration and Republicans have been relentless in their crusade against a woman's right to make her own health care decisions.
I know firsthand the importance of protecting access to health care for everyone -- that's why I got into this race in the first place. I'm in this fight to put an end to the constant attacks on reproductive rights and women's health care -- during the current crisis and beyond.
[_**We need you in this fight, too. Add your name and speak out against Trump and Republicans ' attacks on reproductive freedom and health care -> **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d30b/3d199a51/2f48748e/7364c56b/971052107/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200513p_ns")
Thank you,
Kathy

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘The Biggest Political Scandal of Our Time’
body:
"If ever there was a threat to the rule of law, it was the Obama administration’s abuse of power and its weaponization of intelligence agencies..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=52fc3d0cb1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘The Biggest Political Scandal of Our Time’**

“For years now the media have done everything they can to push the Trump-Russia collusion hoax—even after a years-long special counsel investigation by Robert Mueller turned up nothing—using the complexity of the scheme to hide the greatest political scandal of our time in plain sight,” John Daniel Davidson writes in _The Federalist_.

“If ever there was a threat to the rule of law, it was the Obama administration’s abuse of power and its weaponization of intelligence agencies in an attempt to take down Trump.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a473d7b16&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| "A stunning 39 separate officials snooped on Mr. Flynn’s conversations with foreign actors, lodging nearly 50 unmasking demands between Nov. 30, 2016 and Jan. 12, 2017.” Many of the people on that list are “partisan officials who had no business spying on their successors," _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ac52a5da6&e=3ee4985eea) _editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| President Trump will visit a medical equipment distributor in Pennsylvania today, “where he’s expected to talk about coronavirus testing and the equipment needed to combat the public health crisis,” Laura Olson reports for [_The Morning Call_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1d46156b0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “House Democrats have released a completely unserious proposal to respond to the public health and economic crisis the nation is confronting as a result of COVID-19. Spanning more than 1,800 pages, the bill represents a partisan laundry list of mostly bad policies, calling for trillions of dollars of additional deficit spending on handouts and items unrelated to the crisis,” [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=074e8754f0&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f598fa0b17&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f96f399a1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1ad0e47620)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Time to ramp up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
We’ve asked for your support a lot throughout this campaign. We’ve asked you to volunteer, make calls, host events, and talk to your friends. And we’ve also asked you to donate. Often. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BQE/ni0YAA/t.31r/l5e7NXRmT6yAH0rIhfjsTg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEeKqEvRuT8cEQ0sDEfesUve3MjenldZTWuhTiGtPlsMXv7A-2FA58lpIYzEgFxn54mwDQiAgFCwFr0ZGCZjlKaXCKY7Q6g-2FrUzTTXhtXsSkdkGzYzQ1AXT1ujCZukPqeBWasS3h1RRUxrX80eK-2BF-2BnMVyBkvmSFUNGW6OOii67p4u3vGjODLPf1Vv-2B38pdf2PCGnmjXHv9f2Kt8AYCmIh9wigmjb7iX3j8XOu5QR21gL3wr/pNjD) Friend, **** **** **** We’ve asked for your support a lot throughout this campaign. We’ve asked you to volunteer, make calls, host events, and talk to your friends. And we’ve also asked you to donate. _Often_.
We’ve spent donations on staff, campaign materials, an office (before COVID), a phone dialer, texts, and more. Now, with less than six weeks to go, it’s time to really ramp up the campaign.
What does that mean?
Soon, voters throughout the district will start hearing from our campaign a lot more. That means mailers to voters, digital ads on Facebook and elsewhere online, and TV ads from Mondaire. Plus we will still be calling and texting voters every single day. (Shout out to our college fellows who made almost 10,000 calls in a single phone bank this week! That's more than other candidates are able to do in an entire week.)
These are some of the biggest expenses of the campaign. We need to pick up our fundraising in the next few weeks to make sure we get our message out and don’t get drowned out by self-funders and candidates who are taking money from corporations.
In order to hit our budget, our goal is to raise an additional $200,000. To get there, we need to reach our mid-month goal for May, _but right now, we’re $9,820 away_. **_[Will you make a donation now so we can meet our goal and stay on track?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BQE/ni0YAA/t.31r/l5e7NXRmT6yAH0rIhfjsTg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEeK63S3C2vVfN-2BMBs-2BOzsyrM1nBa8E1WR3jJA-2FFdigbHtHJd-2Bz5Oyu5q-2Ba5hc6xXr9uJW2OoXVbavMZojZuodsZwHf6PUR7BT80A0Yo73ZcMs9Nj8y82tZFwuHsTEw14AMbj2wnYsaz-2FCifIMEPwW3Bhs-2FAdwhzFc2wWFBdaYxGOLvUJIGj6YEwIvbirmGizpfT2RxvzDB-2F-2BafxYyFSsOo9e-2FPtSyDb75HeM9AP34n1sr/rKoI) _**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BQE/ni0YAA/t.31r/l5e7NXRmT6yAH0rIhfjsTg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEeMpPO4N6Vw6eZHL46rgwIXlOMLcHL8-2BXZmg7yi9KdCRHQmAktBj8Hi29demlwei7J5B0DJsroMXXdf8P3jGihMaFhXKPwGyzm8J0v3o0SuzBLPO3xthaMNZtsPJ5nM3gOvxKWWuevQ7wFAXP9Fs2Nd-2F51CV1R10METPIJgGqNdCVmSIJu7Gc61GN0A0Aiik20YwA0t8Z8McLMQvMToyQZH6sZ-2BEuGzIw5GOHJ3hds-2Bw5/eq5H)
Everything in the campaign comes down to these last few weeks. We wish fundraising weren’t so important, but the fact is, you can’t win a race like this without spending well over a million dollars. We’re so close to hitting our fundraising goals, but we’re not there yet. **_[Can you donate today to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BQE/ni0YAA/t.31r/l5e7NXRmT6yAH0rIhfjsTg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEeHpiiRi7GjZLzcQFP7GaGCEI5HR8wxrW766-2B8dI0EtBPphxFueU8zFJ3-2BQRMAC5upgdr0gSaWsFRf27mWnohMbszzgRw8TYptpVwsSq9B7mq-2FIhCy2JDJfctKGMqsgbYXM1NJ5b-2F275dMB0Ul8aJcI5yBTYXTH63oymfoYz8T2izgtPsfToKpJcQcGFoj8P3GDrtfF7mpempvcBNhSdxZlUahmdnWW-2FkuPoR1kogmuK0/Jzqi)_**

There is only one candidate in this race who is fighting for real change that will make a difference in the lives of everyday people. You and I both know that. Now, we just need to make sure every Democratic voter in NY-17 knows that. **_[Help us get that message out there](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BQE/ni0YAA/t.31r/l5e7NXRmT6yAH0rIhfjsTg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDgh2zEf6e2WlXYc3NNPSSpEePKgi42TyHOeYqKi3KXmlQ46AUBArKBq6Tr6yaWJv67w7FOnTbRXdN5v7Jeg2XRO9cUIQH6-2BAgFR-2FJjv9uSJMTWGI1MFoGVfMb4IMi7PJ6t-2B-2Bfs09ZFFG18-2FXL0IP0Z8u-2BdeIYGZ383uGDTRf8mCM28XRJZhY1xL2P6PkhCTYoaBi9tExggNReQ03zZmnbBHisSsZGVNo-2BL7f-2BQ94V93rx3YoqTJ-2F-2BDzcHgmYe628UeN/v2AQ)_**.
Let’s win this, Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager

\------ Forwarded Message ------
Sender: Carlos Gimenez
Subject: Fighting for Florida
Date: April 11, 2020

Friend,

My name is Carlos Gimenez. I am a conservative Cuban immigrant running to represent Florida's 26th Congressional District and take back the House for Republicans.

Let me tell you a little bit about myself ...

I came to this country for a better life from Cuba during the Revolution with my family. I have strived my entire life to give back to the community and country that has given me every opportunity I could have ever imagined.

From a Miami Firefighter, to Mayor of Miami-Dade County, I have been blessed to serve this community and country.

[**Now I 'm running for Congress to give the people of South Florida a better voice in Congress.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001osyV33xelSv3W9p1z9pZq1QS7snZSihjgw_eQ5Jy6XVvc8FdVHlWWPv1wfo6aGkLHul3KOq0NRfMJ0OHRGxglxfqogGmkjJ0l8ndwtV-qwNs1aCtLKU8XaHDGmA_4_fOqqcizJ7BDSb3kO-VuLxfrLLBWdG-wTDXzykKYf85V4-RnkFbe8w-vUJT0AZMau-MucUtUS-APsLFN0-wUe48S8_l9MtLppYHXGts7KX-mFVMNVUYpK4_Zzxp_c8ppGIZnl1JSlKV1RWgBojZASnp1CJz-NREYuJTiLScNW0Fqrtmf_mPbbJ71-eWeixqE6ZFQavwuYf3X-9EifjpmWjCj02e_0DsdSWZW90pXlUXIpDXrODUYfBfBkKbZyIXPsSJuotgo9przUdp54svNEAp1Tg2qSLnaQbF0ExPnwa2rwc=&c=Hj2Kb1MNDGQ6Vxx14FaxLtK3tSbPZwiNcNoF8DM9XPLmZsI8wwOeBQ==&ch=-J8SkjCEhOZ08FuULNEJ1x8jq8D48G5r7a2vA4pp4fJdpAyRjPIQ7w==) We need someone who will focus on representing us, not someone who is worried about playing partisan politics.

I can't do it without your help, Friend. If we are going to send a message to Washington, D.C. we are going to need all the help we can get.

This is my home. I love this country, this state, and this community. I know that we deserve better and that's exactly why I am running. name: Martha McSally
subject: What we are fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
Our economy and job market was booming before the outbreak of COVID-19. As part of President Trump's taskforce to reopen the economy, I am fighting to protect American jobs and help Americans get back on their feet. Together, we will come out of this stronger...but only with strong leadership!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yX8C_FL1gT0dvZVfj4-vEHyhMjtoCCjruiXiIPAiIrWLXvCobF3oAKWrx9g2tc0GW7yM4TsrPQ9a4qdUG3_6oK0o9-W-bjl4vC6JM1RCfFhr-KHOjaVxiAIIS3WsGyeoQkNZtdajyBLV27x9mgbwrw6Y6kv44RFgEHJwGkYRm5nw0gXE7UggQZR0b7i2eIlhe_XlfcjKYqxdsmU_Y5MGKBcNgwaOfhb10QJ0hfntvhHJDUSZp_FwKoPE8K5ZIrs6jMxErquf9QMgEtGoHUQSgX6eGnr89EvWDok3iW8bfed1uXsWljpMTQIYxyok9QUJHbNbq-PPSQtiLj7yhiDTu6g5idOxU09H9FoF2S7DmIf3Bz8mLHeL7_Xq_y9vRNrCGruFHccPJZI4abC6SAnJikyFNxA2O7rP4qqMfaE49Sk=&c=HdN1UttSHLU1gUQ6I_18zAiP2_fBaBzpCmme4HRofoNrrWLQciDdRg==&ch=mggfx7OWo6uCnCmlJSqq3R2tOZ1Jkur_Quz8Clh6cCX3r_--tMKNvg==)
Friend, in the middle of an election, there is a lot of noise. It's important you know what this fight is all about.

**What we are fighting for:** Our economy and job market was booming before the outbreak of COVID-19. As part of President Trump's taskforce to reopen the economy, I am fighting to protect American jobs and help Americans get back on their feet. Together, we will come out of this stronger... _but only with strong leadership!_

I'm working with my fellow Republican colleagues to put America First. [**Will you help us to defend conservative values leading up to November? Chip in $35 or more now >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yX8C_FL1gT0dvZVfj4-vEHyhMjtoCCjruiXiIPAiIrWLXvCobF3oAKWrx9g2tc0GMxf1rq94a2jhG51GI3gVnvregLaGroIzc3xDSJJNKuZ0ECwBy8AHXx9JJ4c34zkd21drwXn-Mp93HQPTrkTEeZv-bH29Rrh6J2cJ9OFQxWrRRvDRCLLb_jn2RdrLUgFr-tb2KW2QtQUPP0R3QX_1R5XupHnQRCKy2-szpPw0BqtNX0MA5bDouqUcIMkYMhc0bOxJbf2yQptWevaxDnN-g0pAeR-6CDzPHchk_NN1eMAHVoKWXbruWascy3vNYCctr1dmK8b1q9PRIG4Y4ja_-6UqADB1BXy5Sh0Ugh-8dOvL27HVkm7JXwTtK4PvTA5xwnyEBZAvNn7oTX_9Nfvpan2YZNVEeaG5igftPuXUXtKdCB_i75TYKg==&c=HdN1UttSHLU1gUQ6I_18zAiP2_fBaBzpCmme4HRofoNrrWLQciDdRg==&ch=mggfx7OWo6uCnCmlJSqq3R2tOZ1Jkur_Quz8Clh6cCX3r_--tMKNvg==)

We need to focus on our jobs and security. This includes holding China accountable for their role in the spread of the coronavirus, as well as ensuring we secure our borders. This isn't a political issue - this is about your safety and security.

Tax reform, criminal justice reform, confirming 2 Supreme Court Justices, and much more - I am proud of what we've accomplished, but we have more work to do.

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17494835/196216180/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUzYzY5Yy0xYTk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMMRDj7NYrqOP1p2l0bj3E4O6qcIbzX8L5a3ghZSzFg=&emci=5b900f4f-1696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c9e3c69c-1a96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

Team-

This year’s election is shaping up to be unlike any other in modern history.

Not only will November’s election be a referendum on four years of dangerous policies, misinformation, and corruption, but it will likely look different in practice, as well.

After meeting with my organizing team earlier this week, we’ve decided that we need to alter the way we approach our “Get Out the Vote” plan this fall.

**Not only will we need to adapt our campaign game-plan to account for social distancing -- we also need to make sure that we have the resources to ensure every voter in TX-22 is able to safely cast their ballot -- no matter what.** _**[Donate to this *NEW* GOTV Plan>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17494836/196216181/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.14_SPK_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUzYzY5Yy0xYTk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMMRDj7NYrqOP1p2l0bj3E4O6qcIbzX8L5a3ghZSzFg=)**_

**Team, I hate to say this, but there are bad actors who are going to use this pandemic as a way to suppress votes and voices.**

They know that the tide is changing and that keeping voter turnout low will be key to them holding on to their influence in Texas. **That’s why we’re adapting our GOTV plan to include more voter education and outreach.**

While our Republican opponents are in a frantic race to the right, our campaign wants to ensure that no TX-22 resident, regardless of party or political leaning, is denied the opportunity to vote due to lack of information.

**Help us get out the vote, no matter the circumstances, by donating to our new and expanded GOTV fund:**

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17494842/196216187/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.14_SPK_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUzYzY5Yy0xYTk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMMRDj7NYrqOP1p2l0bj3E4O6qcIbzX8L5a3ghZSzFg=)

Sri

Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Team- This year’s election is shaping up to be unlike any other in modern history. Not only will November’s election be a referendum on four years of dangerous policies, misinformation, and corruption, but it will likely look different in practice, as well. After meeting with my organizing team earlier this week, we’ve decided that we need to alter the way we approach our “Get Out the Vote” plan this fall. Not only will we need to adapt our campaign game-plan to account for social distancing -- we also need to make sure that we have the resources to ensure every voter in TX-22 is able to safely cast their ballot -- no matter what. = | = = = = = Team, I hate to say this, but there are bad actors who are going to use this pandemic as a way to suppress votes and voices. They know that the tide is changing and that keeping voter turnout low will be key to them holding on to their influence in Texas. That’s why we’re adapting our GOTV plan to include more voter education and outreach. While our Republican opponents are in a frantic race to the right, our campaign wants to ensure that no TX-22 resident, regardless of party or political leaning, is denied the opportunity to vote due to lack of information. Help us get out the vote, no matter the circumstances, by donating to our new and expanded GOTV fund: = Let’s make this a record year for turn out in TX-22, team! Sri | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Tune in at 7 PM for Sid Miller on rumored meat shortages in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Join me and Ag. Comm. Miller tonight for a tele-townhall | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c80a6d72b275/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12455574?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Thursday, May 14, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall To Be Joined By Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller Thursday Evening For Tele-Townhall**

_Sugar Land Republican To Discuss Food Supply Chain With Statewide Elected Official and Prominent Campaign Supporter_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall will hold a tele-townhall with Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller at 7:10pm this evening to discuss our food supply chain and address recent media speculation of national meat and food shortages. Miller has endorsed Wall’s campaign for Congress and adds considerable political heft in the run-up to the July 14th Republican runoff election.

In recent weeks Wall has been actively engaging with small business and restaurant owners throughout the shutdown, hosting tele-townhalls and participating in discussions on how fastest to get people back to their regular lives and help our economy recover.

“Nobody is better more active on the frontlines of our critical food infrastructure than Commissioner Miller, and I’m honored to have his endorsement and his guidance in my campaign for Congress,” said Wall. “In Congress I’ll be a strong ally of protecting our beef industry and rooting out wasteful spending in the federal Department of Agriculture, ensuring Texans get the services they’re paying for.”

###

This Asian and Pacific Islander American Heritage Month carries with it a special significance, and much to celebrate. In the past year, several major presidential contenders of Asian and Pacific Islander heritage have run in the Democratic primary, **and a new generation of political talent from these communities is at the forefront of a burgeoning progressive movement that has made Georgia a fiercely competitive general election state.**

Asian Americans are the fastest growing ethnic group in Georgia. Languages like Hindi, Korean, Tagalog, Vietnamese, Mandarin Chinese, and Cantonese are being spoken in more homes every day, and these neighbors of ours contribute not only to Georgia’s rich cultural diversity, but also our growing economic power.

Unfortunately, there has been serious adversity this year. We are seeing unprecedented levels of racist scapegoating of Chinese-Americans along with the broader Asian American community by our own President. But those racist actions cannot mask his incompetent government response to the coronavirus pandemic. Unemployment now tops 14% — the highest seen since the Great Depression. Minority-owned small businesses are being wiped out, a disproportionate amount of relief benefits are going to white-owned businesses, and misguided fears of how the virus is spread — promoted by Donald Trump — have led to a spike in hate crimes against Asian Americans and the avoidance of their business establishments.

Georgia’s Asian American communities have been confronted with voter suppression, cruel family separation immigration policies, and unacceptable levels of racism, xenophobia, and religious bigotry. **Our next senator must do everything she can to honor, respect, and represent all Georgians in the Senate in response not only to this pandemic, but also to the conditions that existed before it occurred.**

I am grateful to have the endorsement of the progressive Asian American Advocacy Fund, the Georgia-based grassroots organization fighting this administration’s cruel policies, as well as for gay and transgender rights, a Green New Deal, and laws reflecting the mantra that Black Lives Matter. Their support in this primary means a great deal, and I will work every day to continue earning it.

**Friend, we are building a multiracial, multiethnic and multifaith movement to win Georgia and flip the Senate majority in this very winnable election, but I need your help.**

[**Please make a donation today with less than 4 weeks until our June 9 primary. Last cycle, CA-25 was one of the flips that took back the House and put the gavel back in Nancy Pelosi's hands. And we'll be frank with you Peter -- too many Democrats thought this was an easy victory. **We 'll even admit the House wasn't at the top of our mind either -- but you better believe it is NOW.**
We're ready to deploy all of our resources to defend frontline House members, expand our majority, and ultimately hold onto the HOUSE. [**All we need is you on board! body:
When Kentuckians come together, we can accomplish anything.

---
|
---

name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: Influential Conservative Women’s Group Endorses Claire Chase for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: May 14, 2020 CONTACT: Mike Berg PHONE: (614) 678-1909 EMAIL: [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org)
---
| Influential Conservative Women's Group Endorses Claire Chase for Congress
ROSWELL, NM - Today the Claire Chase for Congress campaign is pleased to announce the endorsement of VIEW PAC, the Value in Electing Women Political Action Committee.
VIEW PAC Executive Director Julie Conway said, "VIEW PAC was founded to support strong conservative women like Claire Chase. Claire is a political outsider and a successful businesswoman. She represents the future of the conservative movement and will make a tremendous representative for New Mexico's Second Congressional District."
Claire Chase said, "I am incredibly grateful to have VIEW PAC's endorsement as we continue our fight to turn New Mexico red. Conservatives from across the country are rallying around our campaign because they recognize that we are the only campaign that is capable of taking back this seat in November and firing Nancy Pelosi once and for all."
VIEW PAC is exclusively dedicated to protecting and increasing the number of Republican women in the U.S. House and U.S. Senate. Its singular goal is to strategically provide financial support where and when it is needed most; whether it be for a vulnerable incumbent or a competitive candidate. Since VIEW PAC started over 20 years ago, it has directly contributed and helped to raise over $8,500,000 for Republican women running for Congress.

---
| ###

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: They want to turn TX into CA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
We're going to stop them
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ARLL4Eiig_e3nLn-Y9wMwcvXAqAwxsavAq0BMHcPV7VNB3DKRy0Vf26uyZ-9jQGPc-FwivtRL_wzF3XcqurdxhMs-AIbw30mGZwcGJYImX_-v2OOYWm8VndfTUwuGSgMEnL0d8ae8RHFuOtIUQFL_4J5_oYMbxKFwNbWFwU_cUoQlXp1sYeKqw==&c=wdBkcqwXdNhA7PX0wy4O1J2YtRXE1GD8L6gcy2VUuOQ9nxEBEnoOdw==&ch=NmAKqZARlKvsr9gZv68R89Zc4VdEqxFNSoM4BzqanlCkEE8JjyCWSA==)
---
| Peter,
Texans aren't the only ones fed up with California-style progressive politics. You know who else is? Californians themselves! This week, Nancy Pelosi's team suffered a major blow. Republicans got a huge win, taking back a longtime congressional seat! In California. In Los Angeles County.
It's no secret that Nancy Pelosi and Colin Allred want to bring leftist policies to Texas. They want to flip all of Texas blue. We're here to tell them that will never happen! [Help me take this seat back!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ARLL4Eiig_e3nLn-Y9wMwcvXAqAwxsavAq0BMHcPV7VNB3DKRy0Vf26uyZ-9jQGPc-FwivtRL_wzF3XcqurdxhMs-AIbw30mGZwcGJYImX_-v2OOYWm8VndfTUwuGSgMEnL0d8ae8RHFuOtIUQFL_4J5_oYMbxKFwNbWFwU_cUoQlXp1sYeKqw==&c=wdBkcqwXdNhA7PX0wy4O1J2YtRXE1GD8L6gcy2VUuOQ9nxEBEnoOdw==&ch=NmAKqZARlKvsr9gZv68R89Zc4VdEqxFNSoM4BzqanlCkEE8JjyCWSA==)
If Republicans can win in liberal California, surely we can take back the 32nd Congressional District right here in Texas! Pelosi is spending over one million dollars to stop me, so I need your help TODAY. body:
Friend,
Nancy Pelosi and the far left are adamant on taking back this critical Republican held seat. They will stop at nothing to expand their Democrat majority in Congress to roll out a liberal agenda filled with government run healthcare, the Green New Deal, and tax increases.
We need representatives in Congress who are focused on doing what is right for their districts instead of party politics. Rodney Davis has been a leader in Illinois putting this district first each and every day. [_**If we let the far left replace Rodney with Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan in Congress that will spell disaster for this district! **_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CfLBXMt_QMUoHPOrguni8cO4QCfyH6DwxXjL9BKRn7yHC1UeyHuoBe0vWQmn4xGRpDybeTd6Yzrvzdra5GpzZ_SGxFUJlwjoD536j0rK0XuN5E_FeET6eRognFqcAh18j5ZPN_cSwUxG2DHX5pHalbywxMvG8lfldSafDNfrgw0q37ecrJoGhEkhjD0A73AfpMqEQuDbRCgrDXWtC1CrC2CssugBf0NMaXkZv7mNDNbBOqCsItmxORJDsTAQCuBL-IV8LP0s6cEivNWMwveVbIM4A3PUEWyx_dhcikNmWWuDC5aq5mamh1oClZa0dbSXc5UXQVCgUGs9q2EmdNuNt8KCYYkU_AakG89w7wjDUq0nlquaAwBd5oRIIQj-aCQWKQt2NNAR8yc=&c=um_mlk7W1EmnqG3Mt_R4u814jdi8_jIEbaeUoomrtxZusOC1cnJFCw==&ch=n5zO014mJY0Zbq2rntSW5xUywwcthwmlk9s8oj2YnuJRsfpCc039pQ==)
Rodney has been a staunch leader in Congress, leading the way to finding solutions towards innovating our economy and infrastructure, all while working with community leaders to make sure their voices are heard.
Even now, Rodney continues to work as a leader to find meaningful solutions during this pandemic. He is putting people before politics because it is what we need most right now.
While Rodney is putting his district first, Nancy Pelosi and the far left are using a SuperPac to funnel money into this district to support Rodney's opponent. **We need your help to fight back!**

body:
I'm encouraged by Congressman Jeff Van Drew's platform to fight to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for our New Jersey family.
Hi Friend,
Did you see Congressman Van Drew's recent email? While this pandemic plagues our state and nation, we need leadership that is willing to stand up again Nancy Pelosi and her socialist Democrats in Washington to fight for our families.
Throughout this crisis, few things have become abundantly clear. One of those is that family is worth fighting for.
I'm encouraged by Congressman Jeff Van Drew's platform to fight to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for our New Jersey family. We need the leadership of Rep. Jeff Van Drew in Washington. [_**Can you chip in today to help the fight for A Strong America?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J08ZMu6c8gv5rq6zsQJ4G3ozFanF7E6h4y7kV_XcCOSG0Egb5O5Z16Q6pwu9BDjul_EnCVJY6anPwLZ8ixrvyjDmoTbOFNC0KwnWA2_ljB8ucUwUrBpDrul-ShLgBmgHp3Yebb5Sb1PcRFfL98yxVlaRWdzX-qq3v26U4xAiF7PpBcitcxRIPbT4HoBdrokyroqayWUHmlsgQtV3u6oqJ-SocvtnIZwoAtiSGHMgHeGH_5BN7PKFX3G_CUdU-BZ0Ilq4U1L8_wgWLMjaMTvUdF4enzzEStXUeeTfhPvEpbHAn2KR3VZI4D4ztpdppV8uYLgBSTPXK-5UwkyTzKNY7knrRwgMQ6E4NQ-NndGrv5WVGJ3WCRlUrg==&c=zGfaDWDG0heGaB-IPU4_yhWRpqzjQNhEVHWBhB-CeO6kbklmKqot4w==&ch=TlA0qGr8cqszXKri8ghiQ24voN_9wNMC4S1CyAG71Io87vGem8f11w==)
Sincerely,

Chairman Doug Steinhardt
NJGOP
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jeff Van Drew
Date: Mon, May 11, 2020
Subject: A Strong America
To: Chairman Doug Steinhardt
Friend,
Like I told President Trump in the Oval Office, I became a Republican because the Democratic Party has become a party led by extreme socialists who are fixated on trying to remove the President from office. Unfortunately, things didn't change once the coronavirus pandemic hit and we saw yet again just how partisan and petty my former party could be -- even in the face of one of the greatest challenges our nation has ever faced.
That's why I'm running for re-election as a Republican. I want to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for future generations, but Nancy Pelosi has put a target on my back and is determined to take back my seat for the Democrats. [_**Will you chip in $10, $25 or even $50 to help me fight back and keep this seat for the NJGOP?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J08ZMu6c8gv5rq6zsQJ4G3ozFanF7E6h4y7kV_XcCOSG0Egb5O5Z16Q6pwu9BDjul_EnCVJY6anPwLZ8ixrvyjDmoTbOFNC0KwnWA2_ljB8ucUwUrBpDrul-ShLgBmgHp3Yebb5Sb1PcRFfL98yxVlaRWdzX-qq3v26U4xAiF7PpBcitcxRIPbT4HoBdrokyroqayWUHmlsgQtV3u6oqJ-SocvtnIZwoAtiSGHMgHeGH_5BN7PKFX3G_CUdU-BZ0Ilq4U1L8_wgWLMjaMTvUdF4enzzEStXUeeTfhPvEpbHAn2KR3VZI4D4ztpdppV8uYLgBSTPXK-5UwkyTzKNY7knrRwgMQ6E4NQ-NndGrv5WVGJ3WCRlUrg==&c=zGfaDWDG0heGaB-IPU4_yhWRpqzjQNhEVHWBhB-CeO6kbklmKqot4w==&ch=TlA0qGr8cqszXKri8ghiQ24voN_9wNMC4S1CyAG71Io87vGem8f11w==)
**[**DONATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J08ZMu6c8gv5rq6zsQJ4G3ozFanF7E6h4y7kV_XcCOSG0Egb5O5Z16Q6pwu9BDjul_EnCVJY6anPwLZ8ixrvyjDmoTbOFNC0KwnWA2_ljB8ucUwUrBpDrul-ShLgBmgHp3Yebb5Sb1PcRFfL98yxVlaRWdzX-qq3v26U4xAiF7PpBcitcxRIPbT4HoBdrokyroqayWUHmlsgQtV3u6oqJ-SocvtnIZwoAtiSGHMgHeGH_5BN7PKFX3G_CUdU-BZ0Ilq4U1L8_wgWLMjaMTvUdF4enzzEStXUeeTfhPvEpbHAn2KR3VZI4D4ztpdppV8uYLgBSTPXK-5UwkyTzKNY7knrRwgMQ6E4NQ-NndGrv5WVGJ3WCRlUrg==&c=zGfaDWDG0heGaB-IPU4_yhWRpqzjQNhEVHWBhB-CeO6kbklmKqot4w==&ch=TlA0qGr8cqszXKri8ghiQ24voN_9wNMC4S1CyAG71Io87vGem8f11w==)**
A Strong America means strong borders to make sure that our country is safe. It means a strong military so we always have the protection and strength we need.
A Strong America means having a strong supply chain so that we produce and manufacture our own goods - so that we produce and manufacture drugs and prescriptions right here in the United States of America.
Independence is what keeps us strong. Self-reliance is what keeps us going. We cannot rely on other countries, like Communist China, to help us - we must always put America first!
I need your help to get that message of A STRONG AMERICA out - chip in today so we can get our message far and wide:
**[Chip in $100](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J08ZMu6c8gv5rq6zsQJ4G3ozFanF7E6h4y7kV_XcCOSG0Egb5O5Z16Q6pwu9BDjugPSWVZNQnkOtyEGQ4saAtEt4dpg5z9RzpvKDSnaxli-t0fvGxE1iIToYWV5VHxcXhqAb3k0AZATMGVCXfvwaEyqaVWorx1TD_dyjqRxwujcHy-_zqIPqM5kmEWieAYEX7N8_Q4rtC6_rkjrG6xsDue6c8mgkiVdBNVB178JccsKsEcwAMz_Jlcty9mbqd8mwCsMHmT2LkzE1KlWLj19bmwcWTjg5ot-FokSrHcJhAj08yQFjUXSjuets3ru1ypkXa2t2Y1YjeJYUMl8Dh4N9GQ4zpuc8ze3bzv4hXeOg_IOl2SuUbKCviE5MfvHCcvzz&c=zGfaDWDG0heGaB-IPU4_yhWRpqzjQNhEVHWBhB-CeO6kbklmKqot4w==&ch=TlA0qGr8cqszXKri8ghiQ24voN_9wNMC4S1CyAG71Io87vGem8f11w==)

[Chip in $10 ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J08ZMu6c8gv5rq6zsQJ4G3ozFanF7E6h4y7kV_XcCOSG0Egb5O5Z16Q6pwu9BDjugwRvv7k3trTFpdm7q94VOO30xkEK0YRk308stFRMpBFlkdHeGya2A427rGQxkUvh7SBl_M_4a0E3zXFiAKVcdN_hJmPxq0DeJxTPT-QL_rTH27yH7X9vLja4yDEGwp5EJl36m_UH1pd-uJ-SDaLh4-NG59XiC4Fry_kHLlv-WnyzBBnuIQZjHgoq5dp74pgwh_MnEFH0GU5Ehw9Cc4JxaTb8zU9EZBNILHtcGbAL9kF4B-biTEEg5dWIDR3UcmgREmIKjpjEk2sL5vtsbsvTH_nPT5-whGXr7xQIzEl_aQdk2W8TtrFVWQ==&c=zGfaDWDG0heGaB-IPU4_yhWRpqzjQNhEVHWBhB-CeO6kbklmKqot4w==&ch=TlA0qGr8cqszXKri8ghiQ24voN_9wNMC4S1CyAG71Io87vGem8f11w==)**

Jeff Van Drew
United States Congressman

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: One year ago today I announced my candidacy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's been a great year on the campaign trail and the best is yet to come!
Friend,
It's been exactly one year ago today that I announced I was running to replace far left liberal Abby Finkenauer. Iowans deserve more than a representative [_**who is OK with voting with Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez 91% of the time for their extreme policy agenda**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eWi0cms33eQszJFnadf9GV82uY4jRNYCtynDKAlMziVatAcSiE1LyafqWB4N4ApPFnizQxcIwv1jqzTOyZUN_Z_KJ7jg7cPylomovVpifiBd7OEcRpmb6NE6ESypj8ExzDQ7eEuj6d3WBm8rAxPPub5kRMNvkVy4TGUFrGCQsrq_i1t0hN44r4sycnL9UEZRpVp3iygEtt33y63FpTtpnaNLvb6FXhKksqCrdi1LeyFq5_-QiL8DXIT9oGUDDoR4NwHqwZheakmSy5VBuSfZCpFau1ySB0hXxvxFPdQToaVUWWX1esFDdi-tGpvDJKzVs3AF-ZokyxhjUcoKq-mbCfYL_rljtrE71Yw7i_8kL03QGTo1Hm4Xs5fbSF1_hGKfhckmdnfPrkc=&c=7iChPGIxRN1u9IBcsunV1FsIb6px3i20_rajYsCZOfPXqf8EO6eAHA==&ch=cJcJMJpZz_FNxGNU9JTyXCGuIIqOsbpv8gCpxgyUxBRK8cimWfutYw==).
I believe I speak for this district when I say that we are **NOT** OK with that. [_**We are not OK with supporting a liberal agenda filled with the tax increases to front items like the Green New Deal, government run healthcare, and other socialist wishlist items**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eWi0cms33eQszJFnadf9GV82uY4jRNYCtynDKAlMziVatAcSiE1LyafqWB4N4ApPFnizQxcIwv1jqzTOyZUN_Z_KJ7jg7cPylomovVpifiBd7OEcRpmb6NE6ESypj8ExzDQ7eEuj6d3WBm8rAxPPub5kRMNvkVy4TGUFrGCQsrq_i1t0hN44r4sycnL9UEZRpVp3iygEtt33y63FpTtpnaNLvb6FXhKksqCrdi1LeyFq5_-QiL8DXIT9oGUDDoR4NwHqwZheakmSy5VBuSfZCpFau1ySB0hXxvxFPdQToaVUWWX1esFDdi-tGpvDJKzVs3AF-ZokyxhjUcoKq-mbCfYL_rljtrE71Yw7i_8kL03QGTo1Hm4Xs5fbSF1_hGKfhckmdnfPrkc=&c=7iChPGIxRN1u9IBcsunV1FsIb6px3i20_rajYsCZOfPXqf8EO6eAHA==&ch=cJcJMJpZz_FNxGNU9JTyXCGuIIqOsbpv8gCpxgyUxBRK8cimWfutYw==).
Congresswoman Finkenauer is severely out of touch and I refuse to stand on the sidelines while she continues to lead the families of Iowa astray. That is precisely why I decided to run for this seat.
As an award-winning news reporter, I was on the front lines investigating and reporting on breaking news every day. I took my job seriously, I needed to ensure that Iowans were getting the necessary information to keep them safe and informed.
**But, I knew that I could do more for my community**. That's why in 2016, I ran to represent my district in the State House and became the first woman ever to win a blue House seat as a Republican.
As a state representative, I've balanced budgets, improved our schools, and worked to grow our economy. [_**Unlike Congresswoman Finkenauer, when elected I promise to use Iowa common sense to get Congress back to work for the American people**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eWi0cms33eQszJFnadf9GV82uY4jRNYCtynDKAlMziVatAcSiE1LyafqWB4N4ApPFnizQxcIwv1jqzTOyZUN_Z_KJ7jg7cPylomovVpifiBd7OEcRpmb6NE6ESypj8ExzDQ7eEuj6d3WBm8rAxPPub5kRMNvkVy4TGUFrGCQsrq_i1t0hN44r4sycnL9UEZRpVp3iygEtt33y63FpTtpnaNLvb6FXhKksqCrdi1LeyFq5_-QiL8DXIT9oGUDDoR4NwHqwZheakmSy5VBuSfZCpFau1ySB0hXxvxFPdQToaVUWWX1esFDdi-tGpvDJKzVs3AF-ZokyxhjUcoKq-mbCfYL_rljtrE71Yw7i_8kL03QGTo1Hm4Xs5fbSF1_hGKfhckmdnfPrkc=&c=7iChPGIxRN1u9IBcsunV1FsIb6px3i20_rajYsCZOfPXqf8EO6eAHA==&ch=cJcJMJpZz_FNxGNU9JTyXCGuIIqOsbpv8gCpxgyUxBRK8cimWfutYw==).
It's been a great year on the campaign trail and the best is yet to come! [_**Can I count on you to help me continue growing positive momentum as we head into November by chipping in $25, $15, $10, or even $5 today?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eWi0cms33eQszJFnadf9GV82uY4jRNYCtynDKAlMziVatAcSiE1LyafqWB4N4ApPFnizQxcIwv1jqzTOyZUN_Z_KJ7jg7cPylomovVpifiBd7OEcRpmb6NE6ESypj8ExzDQ7eEuj6d3WBm8rAxPPub5kRMNvkVy4TGUFrGCQsrq_i1t0hN44r4sycnL9UEZRpVp3iygEtt33y63FpTtpnaNLvb6FXhKksqCrdi1LeyFq5_-QiL8DXIT9oGUDDoR4NwHqwZheakmSy5VBuSfZCpFau1ySB0hXxvxFPdQToaVUWWX1esFDdi-tGpvDJKzVs3AF-ZokyxhjUcoKq-mbCfYL_rljtrE71Yw7i_8kL03QGTo1Hm4Xs5fbSF1_hGKfhckmdnfPrkc=&c=7iChPGIxRN1u9IBcsunV1FsIb6px3i20_rajYsCZOfPXqf8EO6eAHA==&ch=cJcJMJpZz_FNxGNU9JTyXCGuIIqOsbpv8gCpxgyUxBRK8cimWfutYw==)

clean_body: It's been a great year on the campaign trail and the best is yet to come! Friend, It's been exactly one year ago today that I announced I was running to replace far left liberal Abby Finkenauer. Iowans deserve more than a representative ==. I believe I speak for this district when I say that we are NOT OK with that. ==. Congresswoman Finkenauer is severely out of touch and I refuse to stand on the sidelines while she continues to lead the families of Iowa astray. That is precisely why I decided to run for this seat. As an award-winning news reporter, I was on the front lines investigating and reporting on breaking news every day. I took my job seriously, I needed to ensure that Iowans were getting the necessary information to keep them safe and informed. But, I knew that I could do more for my community. That's why in 2016, I ran to represent my district in the State House and became the first woman ever to win a blue House seat as a Republican. As a state representative, I've balanced budgets, improved our schools, and worked to grow our economy. ==. It's been a great year on the campaign trail and the best is yet to come! == == == == == == Thank you for your continued support and dedication! Ashley Hinson == == PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Obamagate: Political unmasking of Michael Flynn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
In the final days of the Obama Administration, top Obama officials including Joe Biden requested access to secret intelligence reports that mentioned incoming national security advisor General Michael Flynn. Then, the Obama officials leaked this classified information to the Washington Post. This gave dishonest and disgraced FBI officials a pretext to investigate Flynn and set him up.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42499568&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTM3Mzg5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTk1NjgS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MTM3Mzg5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
In the final days of the Obama Administration, top Obama officials including Joe Biden requested access to secret intelligence reports that mentioned incoming national security advisor General Michael Flynn.

Then, the Obama officials leaked this classified information to the Washington Post. This gave dishonest and disgraced FBI officials a pretext to investigate Flynn and set him up.

What national security reason could Joe Biden have for seeking this classified information just eight days before leaving office? Joe Biden isn’t a career intelligence official. He was a politician on his way out of office.

It is clear that the Obama administration was doing everything in its final days to undermine Michael Flynn’s credibility and hurt President Trump as he took office.

I joined Fox News last night to discuss these shocking revelations. Check it out below. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTk1NjgS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MTM3Mzg5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0
Play http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTk1NjgS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MTM3Mzg5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 The actions taken by the Obama Administration and Vice President Biden are shameful and they must be held accountable.

In service,

Tom Cotton

name: Alex Koren
subject: here's where we are:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
We know you share her vision for representation that works for all Floridians, not just a select few and certainly not for special interests.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17496745/196262536/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxMjQ0My0yZjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFOlEqu0kWydzAiLdHXlqGx_E01MzpqlJwDnv5PNQW8=&emci=8de4139c-fd95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c8d12443-2f96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

When Margaret first decided to run for office, people across Florida and the country took notice because she pledged to stand up to special interests and get things done.

She ran as a candidate who would work to find solutions, regardless of what the problem is. And it’s exactly what we’ve seen her do in the state legislature—from sponsoring bills that would expand healthcare access to fighting to clean up our water—she’s fought for Floridians at every turn.

**[We need leaders like Margaret in Washington who will fight for working families in Florida. So, can you help ensure she gets to Congress by making a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17496746/196262537/788213855?refcode=em05142020&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxMjQ0My0yZjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFOlEqu0kWydzAiLdHXlqGx_E01MzpqlJwDnv5PNQW8=)**

We know you share her vision for representation that works for all Floridians, not just a select few and certainly not for special interests.

That is why I wanted to give you an update on our mid-month goal—the bad news is _we haven’t reached it yet_.

The good news? There’s still time.

**[Can you contribute $20 today to help keep us on track for May?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17496747/196262538/788213855?refcode=em05142020&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxMjQ0My0yZjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFOlEqu0kWydzAiLdHXlqGx_E01MzpqlJwDnv5PNQW8=)**

We’re grateful for your support,

Alex Koren
Campaign Manager

body:

| | Two months from today, we'll finally know once and for all who will take on Sen. Cornyn. I plan to be that candidate, Peter, and I know that with your help, we can win this election and flip the Senate in November.

My team tells me we're close to hitting our budget goal today, so **[please make a matched donation before midnight, if you're able, to put us over our 200 new donors goal.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890060/7f51f7bc/4fb5260a/4ef14ce3/529378953/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out?refcode=email_20200514.2nd__1406__&amount=10")**

Everything you're doing is putting us one step closer to winning the nomination and kicking Mitch McConnell's right-hand man out of the Senate.

\-- MJ

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890060/7f51f7bc/4fb5260a/4ef14ce1/529378953/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: What we’ve learned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
what we have been doing so far has been working | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=995113229a9b49dcb7b706b569d56e78&_e=wPkNWDMp3kpd2ccHCs8C-_OV59W23AgKE0D9C7ORcjeDZeCiiRVdZ8Z4zvaezUA17tjPlPkqzJT2LVLny8cOyDBcMMR6tX84Iejvo7hwpxhhpdyjC_6JLguTE90NkVwaDcYKnM9Cqzq8ktOLbnZA39wN2kObUvrhPLuPjgsdhuXZY0bspTAe4XX_OkieikxD2MpqyeLDGL8KHW55OCeJTVsp3_J6iKZp43oY7PyCZuX9UB9z6I7s51m1Yt_7WRzDu7JnIuKGelsnT9Q-jdEzmBlUyUmYsici8lH3tXEyYKqv7mEMCtNG_FCDDRPM-54Xu3yGfCZn1Bz8l06AWW8eDBohwQXLwaSfwdqtBepJ_sRdGWRPcP-lXvluGc_WQlUj) |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**“We’re in this for the long haul and the vigilance portion is everyone’s responsibility.” –Governor Holcomb**_

Since the pandemic began, Governor Holcomb has focused on keeping Hoosiers safe and using data and public health expertise to guide his decisions.

Yesterday, we got our first glimpse into the statewide COVID-19 study from the Fairbanks School of Public Health. The preliminary results of phase 1 of this Fairbanks study confirm that Governor Holcomb’s hunker down policies have helped to flatten the curve and slow the spread.

The data gathered by Fairbanks is extensive, but here’s an overview of some of the bigger points:
* 4,611 Hoosiers were randomly selected and tested between April 25-May 1
* 1.7% of those tested were positive
* 1.1% had antibodies

This tells us that:
* 2.8%, or 186,000, of all Hoosiers have had COVID-19
* Tests on symptomatic Hoosiers available across the state have only identified about 1 in 11 of all infections
* 0.58% of infected people have died (six times more deadly than the seasonal flu)
* 44.8% of people who tested positive showed no symptoms

_**“This study underscores the absolute necessity that folks operate in this new reality going forward.” –Governor Holcomb.**_

The last bullet is of critical importance. Nearly 45% of all Hoosiers who have had the virus showed zero symptoms while they were infected. However, those Hoosiers could easily transmit the virus to anyone they came in close contact with - friends, family members, neighbors, grocery shoppers, etc.

COVID-19 impacts everyone and the preliminary results of the Fairbanks study show why it is critically important for all of us to continue social distancing, practice good hygiene and wear our masks when venturing in heavily trafficked places.

_**"We're in a good spot right now because we have been vigilant. That should reinforce that what we have been doing so far has been working." –Governor Holcomb**_

The next phase of this scientific study will begin in June, and if you get selected, we encourage you to participate.

Most of the state is now in phase 2 of **[Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=995113229a9b49dcb7b706b569d56e78&_e=wPkNWDMp3kpd2ccHCs8C-_OV59W23AgKE0D9C7ORcjeDZeCiiRVdZ8Z4zvaezUA17tjPlPkqzJT2LVLny8cOyDBcMMR6tX84Iejvo7hwpxhhpdyjC_6JLguTE90NkVwaDcYKnM9Cqzq8ktOLbnZA39wN2kObUvrhPLuPjgsdhuWqGMgYQDP0EImeo5U541oGo88Ty-UNK3y2UwJNdB-VSJ7qhJQn9ch_QYXxOy7G8NbvL_vDpsXNkx1KpwN13KuhTsrOFbFXQGF6bzZDBGv4P0LUDtOWrkCI8t9HRWl_miRh76L8atiKNhEWs1RNhA_ibp7KkrjKt4ju20DbI45jGy0zme_q8rxCJXViDMplWmy_VFjCtXbANh-rAo7ivmTa)** and our continued vigilance will allow for even more sectors to begin slowly and responsibly reopening.

#BackonTrack,

-Your Holcomb Crew
---

CONGRATULATIONS - You have been formally selected to join the Trump Presidential Honor Roll in recognition of your unwavering support and commitment to President Donald J. Trump.

Friend,

President Trump has always been able to rely on you as a dedicated supporter, which is why we are proud to offer you the exclusive opportunity to join the Trump Presidential Honor Roll.

As a member of the Honor Roll, President Trump will be relying on YOU to advise him throughout the coming months on the proper course of action when countering the Left’s LIES and deceptions. When he needs guidance, HE’LL TURN TO YOU.

name: Susan Collins
subject: I'm ready to fight back, are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Senator Chuck Schumer and his dark money groups have just launched DOZENS of new ads attacking me in Maine. He has spent millions of dollars against me already and he is not letting up. The far left is coming after me. But I will not back down.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDA3NDcS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTM4MjQ2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDA3NDcS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTM4MjQ2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDA3NDcS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTM4MjQ2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Peter,
Senator Chuck Schumer and his dark money groups have just launched DOZENS of new ads attacking me in Maine. He has spent millions of dollars against me already and he is not letting up.
**The far left is coming after me. But I will not back down.**
Yes, it is going to be difficult. And yes, the attacks from my opponent and her Far Left allies continue to get more egregious by the day. But Peter, make no mistake, I am prepared for the fight on November 3rd. And more important, **I am prepared to win.**
But I can't win without your help. I need fighters alongside me to push back against their relentless attacks. Peter, [**please join me and donate anything you can to my campaign today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDA3NDcS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTM4MjQ2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
If we fight back together, we can set the record straight. We can ensure that Maine and our country have the strong, prosperous future that we deserve. [**Help me fight for Maine and America by donating any amount, just $5 or $10, to my campaign today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MDA3NDcS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTM4MjQ2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) With you by my side, I know we can do this.
All my best,
Susan

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A story about Alaska
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

You may not know Dr. Al Gross yet, but I'll bet you're going to hear a lot about him soon, and I'll tell you why: Al is running for the U.S. Senate in Alaska, and he's got an amazing life story. He was born in the wake of an avalanche. He bought his first fishing boat at age 14, and he even killed a grizzly bear in self defense when it snuck up on him (this is a true story). But there's a lot more: Al worked his way through college and medical school as a commercial fisherman. He became a renowned orthopedic surgeon, then left his practice to study solutions to fixing Alaska's health care system. [**Now, Dr. Gross is challenging Dan Sullivan -- the Republican incumbent who votes with President Trump 97% of the time.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1706/3e0906/78ddc280/3e30d9b2/666301761/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-gross?refcode=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Now+Dr+Gross+is+challenging+Dan+Sullivan&utm_campaign=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&source=20200514_FR_TK_Gross") I'd be thrilled if Alaskan voters sent this strong, independent-minded doctor to join me in the U.S. Senate. I know Al would be a great leader for people back home, and right now -- with the nation struggling in response to a public health crisis and a President dead-set on taking health insurance away from millions of Americans -- it is particularly important to have more doctors in the Senate. But the fact is, he needs a solid set of resources to get the word out about who he is and why he should represent Alaskans in the Senate. Right now, so many people are facing unexpected hardships and economic uncertainties. I know that donating to political candidates isn't always possible financially. **But every donation, however small, makes a huge difference to putting leaders we can be proud of in office.** **So if you're able to, would you consider chipping in $15 or more directly to Dr. Al Gross's Senate campaign?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1706/3e0906/78ddc280/3e30d9b1/666301761/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-gross?refcode=20200514_FR_TK_Gross &amount=15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+15&utm_campaign=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&source=20200514_FR_TK_Gross")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1706/3e0906/78ddc280/3e30d9b0/666301761/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-gross?refcode=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&source=20200514_FR_TK_Gross")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1706/3e0906/78ddc280/3e30d9b7/666301761/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-gross?refcode=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&source=20200514_FR_TK_Gross")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1706/3e0906/78ddc280/3e30d9b6/666301761/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-gross?refcode=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&source=20200514_FR_TK_Gross")

Thanks for all your efforts to flip the Senate -- it means a lot to me, and I know it means a lot to the families all around the country who would benefit from Democratic leadership.
-Tim

However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1706/3e0906/78ddc280/3e30d989/666301761/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20200514_FR_TK_Gross&source=20200514_FR_TK_Gross")

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. name: Kate, Communications Director
subject: Did you catch Mark on Morning Joe?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark is doing what Virginians need him to do most right now: his job.
|
---
| | Derek --

I wanted to make sure you caught Mark's interview on Morning Joe today. He's trying to get the word out about the proposal he's working on with Sens. Sanders, Jones, and Blumenthal to guarantee a paycheck to every American worker making under $90,000. Folks are losing their jobs and their insurance, **and it doesn 't have to be that way.

This bill could be critical for workers and small businesses struggling during the pandemic.** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4bf/53d9897e/54e4fcd0/1c887212/257340916/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-job?refcode=20200514_f_1_nd__579__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
**Mark is doing what Virginians need him to do most right now: his job.** He's fighting to get paycheck security included in the next coronavirus relief package that the Senate passes because he believes it'll be a lifeline for millions of Americans. We're facing record unemployment numbers, Mark knows that families need help right now. He's rolling up his sleeves to make sure the job gets done.

This is a crisis and Mark rightly refuses to politicize it. You won't see us doing that.

But I'm not one to mince words, so I'm going to give you the unvarnished truth: we are a grassroots funded campaign that depends on your support to stay afloat. Folks like you keep this campaign moving forward and if you're in a position to support us financially we could use your help. Mark's focused on his work in the Senate, so it falls to me to make this ask at a time I know is difficult for many.

**[If you believe in Mark's mission and you have the means, will you consider supporting his re-election campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4bf/53d9897e/54e4fcd0/1c887211/257340916/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-job?refcode=20200514_f_1_nd__579__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We are so grateful for this team's support in every form that takes: kind notes to our team, **[volunteers eager to organize online](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4bf/53d9897e/54e4fcd0/1c887210/257340916/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/digital-organizing/")** , and contributions to help re-elect Mark. We hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this challenging time. Know that Mark is fighting hard to make sure that every Virginian -- and every American -- is cared for.

Thank you,

-- Kate, Communications Director

clean_body: Mark is doing what Virginians need him to do most right now: his job. | | | Derek -- I wanted to make sure you caught Mark's interview on Morning Joe today. He's trying to get the word out about the proposal he's working on with Sens. Sanders, Jones, and Blumenthal to guarantee a paycheck to every American worker making under $90,000. Folks are losing their jobs and their insurance, and it doesn 't have to be that way. This bill could be critical for workers and small businesses struggling during the pandemic. | "" Mark is doing what Virginians need him to do most right now: his job. He's fighting to get paycheck security included in the next coronavirus relief package that the Senate passes because he believes it'll be a lifeline for millions of Americans. We're facing record unemployment numbers, Mark knows that families need help right now. He's rolling up his sleeves to make sure the job gets done. This is a crisis and Mark rightly refuses to politicize it. You won't see us doing that. But I'm not one to mince words, so I'm going to give you the unvarnished truth: we are a grassroots funded campaign that depends on your support to stay afloat. Folks like you keep this campaign moving forward and if you're in a position to support us financially we could use your help. Mark's focused on his work in the Senate, so it falls to me to make this ask at a time I know is difficult for many. "" We are so grateful for this team's support in every form that takes: kind notes to our team, "" , and contributions to help re-elect Mark. We hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this challenging time. Know that Mark is fighting hard to make sure that every Virginian -- and every American -- is cared for. Thank you, -- Kate, Communications Director "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
The CARES Act is one of the most extensive stimulus packages ever passed.
It includes $500 billion for the Trump Administration's Treasury Department to lend to businesses and states going through economic hardships. **Even though the American public deserves total transparency on how that money is being spent, President Trump is refusing to allow nonpartisan oversight into the Treasury 's spending.**
Instead, he wants to appoint a partisan Inspector General with deep ties to the White House. _We can 't let that happen._ That's why Linda is demanding the Trump Administration allow Congressional oversight into the Treasury's $500 billion in CARES Act Funding!
[**Demand transparency from Trump 's Treasury | SIGN ON>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zAOlEPTNN0SH6Bs-EjHgbkgGWyOJc9fSYinDHINjXAw=/d4ZjYDsmozz0tXFH2Av1R7HwppdlZnuVU_t9DKm83kQ=)

subject: Final Phase of Primary 2020! Booker is on the Ropes.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
We’ve entered the final phase of the Primary. I need your help now! |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=6c3a28b608&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,

First, thank you – your support and help has allowed us to challenge the old establishment that is protecting Cory Booker.

**Booker's Democrat-inflated polls show him at just 50%._Pathetic_.** Because of you, we have a path to victory. For you, I will win this election.

## We have entered the last phase of this Primary and we need your help now.
---
| [STOP CORY BOOKER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=83ecbcda7a&e=3e017fab0f "STOP CORY BOOKER")
---
| Since COVID-19 has ended the ability to conduct door-to-door campaigning or host fundraisers, we need immediate help to connect with people across the state. Three things we need ASAP:
1. **Funding** : If every single person who gets this email were to give $35 today, we could fully fund a _winning_ campaign till the end of the Primary.

I need your help right now, so if you can give more, now is the time. If you can give just $3, now is the time.

2. **Volunteers** : We have many activities across the state and we need people to help us. [Join here.](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5820feaeb0&e=3e017fab0f)

3. **Outreach** : You have more power than you realize. From a lawn sign that's seen by all your neighbors to a letter to the editor of your local news that's seen by the community to a bumper sticker which is seen by everyone — your opinion has a massive impact on what people decide on Election Day.

[Please check out our store](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2c5073167a&e=3e017fab0f), where we will mail you lawn signs and bumper stickers to your door if you can contribute to the campaign. Some of our supporters [even make their own signs](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=66b6e7ffb8&e=3e017fab0f) and nothing is better than that!

---
| [STOP CORY BOOKER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=6be9729266&e=3e017fab0f "STOP CORY BOOKER")
---
| I will fight as hard as possible for you, and I will not give in an inch. **_If you fight for me, we will win._**

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate
---
|
---
| [STOP CORY BOOKER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=0305cf07ad&e=3e017fab0f "STOP CORY BOOKER")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a8b96f45d6&e=3e017fab0f)

name: Team LaHood
subject: This is what Democratic leadership looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Nancy Pelosi has been working hard to keep Congress at home – and out of the house. We can’t afford two more years of this. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=2554c227378841ecbd4ff941c8965cca&_e=LRgXv7yDvlwZsqiWJzvE3rWZMdSgzeAAnq3y3sNjD0CxgsQFM_y4HV-kl18EuZ3Fn8z4HY-S4w2Jv-BRhDcMXVH3KCb6s5MRPxhiETWfsnO0YmhlU7MRrnVns5oanKWnf4bavs-zm2XnhociwJ0FZs-1HvGTruqGEWwHkTjcjq24IEipiamPmL87aqlsJwEffAgltlcGGh5a9x3dEy5cDUsCtP4Ec_DW6tbnQatwc_4tMEmPqQGuB5rIMc0KCTpEcYsVaYsRD84LFHAReesRUHuzh74acZq13TZkMPaujCLzKX7lzlygxGKWfwZSpna2ILCnHKks1ihSxxD_sR0McRTyaA-09Z4mTYPmYPdlO8gkJRqikcIIpbDioWkPT50sVccUz5NH-vu6Ulr_HKy0WZF7PQz82XSPHm3TdKylqSCfVxVQDmMyZ0rXjCD1oAxze9YQDjx57_4_CJ5_zo7XlCjP44Ct3FlGlD2UlhAY8u8%3D) | |
---
Friend,

Nancy Pelosi thinks she’s doing our country a favor by keeping Congress at home – and out of the House – during this crisis.

All that does is rob Americans of their voice in Washington at a time when they need it most.

_**Friend, this is EXACTLY why we need conservatives to take back the House this year.**_
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=2554c227378841ecbd4ff941c8965cca&_e=LRgXv7yDvlwZsqiWJzvE3rWZMdSgzeAAnq3y3sNjD0CxgsQFM_y4HV-kl18EuZ3Fn8z4HY-S4w2Jv-BRhDcMXVH3KCb6s5MRPxhiETWfsnO0YmhlU7MRrnVns5oanKWnf4bavs-zm2XnhociwJ0FZs-1HvGTruqGEWwHkTjcjq24IEipiamPmL87aqlsJwEffAgltlcGGh5a9x3dEy5cDUsCtP4Ec_DW6tbnQatwc_4tMEmPqQGuB5rIMc0KCTpEcYsVaYsRD84LFHAReesRUGM8_7ErcMsntnp8UmGuP6WR7-GSccGqzttNZtY-OY9H2IHt7heUHCN2K7Z7-hEfWBXHPo2iiaaA_hY0s5xNisitUsqJM73ntZtfv9zK4D-3EkT5RhPGzaXBgC6wsswAg0d47Dw7Tr8x3RUp0oD2U3U7F81XzchXdVEg1d9O0nKb9keUQYh_8FE1NT3DLyFUaRWZpe9wCeibbU1fYYXbmPA%3D)
**Americans are looking to Congress for crucial leadership to keep the economy intact and to keep workers supported right now. What do we see?**

_We see a Republican-led Senate hard at work – conducting hearings, holding votes, and mapping out our country’s next steps to recover from this crisis._

_On the other hand, the House Chamber that has been vacant is finally going to re-open much to Nancy Pelosi's dismay._

**Darin knows that Congress can – and needs to – serve the American people better than it currently does.****We need change, and it has to start at the top.**
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=2554c227378841ecbd4ff941c8965cca&_e=LRgXv7yDvlwZsqiWJzvE3rWZMdSgzeAAnq3y3sNjD0CxgsQFM_y4HV-kl18EuZ3Fn8z4HY-S4w2Jv-BRhDcMXVH3KCb6s5MRPxhiETWfsnO0YmhlU7MRrnVns5oanKWnf4bavs-zm2XnhociwJ0FZs-1HvGTruqGEWwHkTjcjq24IEipiamPmL87aqlsJwEffAgltlcGGh5a9x3dEy5cDUsCtP4Ec_DW6tbnQatwc_4tMEmPqQGuB5rIMc0KCTpEcYsVaYsRD84LFHAReesRUOn9NCg75LAY26WiN7Ppz_jp8NN9LrCLxoJ7T5onf_NeZ5JUTtlQZXWuKnxNzfIpHuOqtM2wUp2XxAoYtG8ahv1SAqSDdTe-_iGYWB3QbJarZ-kZnmWt58Z9CEmXMkvA1xRutAyb2PdCnyF0TE3NK-pTx6kD9_M6DeI_OjvyajrvYDFqXmvIzMxmzO0sat9qAm53ypWC4EGu5KKUOUfG4so%3D)
Every day that Nancy Pelosi kept the doors to the House Chamber closed resulted in more businesses closing their doors and more jobs lost. We can’t afford another two years of her being in charge.

_**Will you join Darin and make sure that we don’t have another two years of Pelosi in charge?**_
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=2554c227378841ecbd4ff941c8965cca&_e=LRgXv7yDvlwZsqiWJzvE3rWZMdSgzeAAnq3y3sNjD0CxgsQFM_y4HV-kl18EuZ3Fn8z4HY-S4w2Jv-BRhDcMXVH3KCb6s5MRPxhiETWfsnO0YmhlU7MRrnVns5oanKWnf4bavs-zm2XnhociwJ0FZs-1HvGTruqGEWwHkTjcjq24IEipiamPmL87aqlsJwEffAgltlcGGh5a9x3dEy5cDUsCtP4Ec_DW6tbnQatwc_4tMEmPqQGuB5rIMc0KCTpEcYsVaYsRD84LFHAReesRUA3kVKDq95FMrm_SyLz5SvHl_nG3r5yAc-kak2y6_yTTz4bR51fCzs0e7qR_EVhQq3oCVOgbqsXT9HzyPbXK8CJE8rY7F4LxSurW47yrESPbczjqwsYX2chPZMFPhbZIhXL9cB2VQ680kRMAz6hVQHMKRFXxsl_V_0CjJXVYYjmm1erNJpeyHbb8qZkW84KF87hfJVhqk_op7988F0aWc58%3D)
Thank you,

Team LaHood

name: GeorgetteGomez.org
subject: fwd: Falling short.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17497960/196295365/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWZhNzYwNi0zZjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR8n2NGPs9v-6NVQdsy2Lm_Gy6UboalChEyyO5UQRHo=&emci=77ac7db8-3696-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=d1fa7606-3f96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friend — we're making sure you saw Georgette’s email about tomorrow's mid-quarter fundraising deadline. We're closing in, but we still need some help hitting our goal. If (and only if) you can contribute, now is the time! Please, make a contribution of any size to Georgette's campaign right away.

**Mid-quarter fundraising goal: $10,000
Raised: $5,119** [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17497961/196295366/1147193815?refcode=em-200514-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWZhNzYwNi0zZjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR8n2NGPs9v-6NVQdsy2Lm_Gy6UboalChEyyO5UQRHo=)
* * *

I'll be direct, friend.

Friday at midnight marks the mid-way point of the current fundraising quarter, but we are falling short of our goal. **[Can you pitch in right away to help us hit this mark so we can prepare for the months ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17497962/196295367/1147193815?refcode=em-200514-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWZhNzYwNi0zZjk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR8n2NGPs9v-6NVQdsy2Lm_Gy6UboalChEyyO5UQRHo=)**

I didn’t take the typical path to public office.

Growing up in Barrio Logan, I had the privilege of being born in this country, but my parents did not. I saw how much they struggled in a system that was stacked against them. Working multiple jobs. At times, we couldn't even afford rent.

But we made the most of it, and it was that experience which led me to become a community organizer — working on environmental justice and land use decisions. It's what motivated me to run for office and become the first queer Latina elected to the San Diego City Council. And it's why I’m taking the next step running for Congress.

I know it won’t be easy now -- especially as we grapple with the coronavirus outbreak. But I know this community is ready for meaningful change to expand affordable housing, end poverty, achieve environmental justice, and ensure health care access for all.

And with that, I must ask:

**[I'm up against a big mid-quarter fundraising deadline on Friday, and right now we’re falling short. Can I count on you to contribute $3 to help us pick up the pace?
