clean_body: | Friend — we're making sure you saw Georgette’s email about tomorrow's mid-quarter fundraising deadline. We're closing in, but we still need some help hitting our goal. If (and only if) you can contribute, now is the time! Please, make a contribution of any size to Georgette's campaign right away. Mid-quarter fundraising goal: $10,000 Raised: $5,119 = I'll be direct, friend. Friday at midnight marks the mid-way point of the current fundraising quarter, but we are falling short of our goal. = I didn’t take the typical path to public office. Growing up in Barrio Logan, I had the privilege of being born in this country, but my parents did not. I saw how much they struggled in a system that was stacked against them. Working multiple jobs. At times, we couldn't even afford rent. But we made the most of it, and it was that experience which led me to become a community organizer — working on environmental justice and land use decisions. It's what motivated me to run for office and become the first queer Latina elected to the San Diego City Council. And it's why I’m taking the next step running for Congress. I know it won’t be easy now -- especially as we grapple with the coronavirus outbreak. But I know this community is ready for meaningful change to expand affordable housing, end poverty, achieve environmental justice, and ensure health care access for all. And with that, I must ask: = If you've save your information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | | = ** | **= **** | | = ** | **= **** | | = ** | **= **** Thank you -- from the bottom of my heart, Georgette | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.** Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please =. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Georgette! Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress Georgette Gómez for Congress 1111 Sixth Ave. #317 San Diego, CA 92101 United States

name: Forever Grateful (via VPP)
subject: Pelosi ❤️ Post Office

body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0499/72412298/4f0ff0f1/6104af64/1269557250/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200514_PelosiPost_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200514_PelosiPost_U1_X1")

| | Peter -- Nancy Pelosi has earned our Forever Stamp® of approval! Peter -- Nancy Pelosi has earned our Forever Stamp® of approval! She's our fearless LEADER for so many reasons but we're adding one to the list:**PELOSI IS SINGLE-HANDEDLY SAVING THE POSTAL SERVICE!** That's right, Team! Nancy's been listening to your pleas to save the Post Office and to allow vote-by-mail. She's put your support into action by including emergency funding in her new COVID-19 relief bill! **We 're so grateful she's listened to our grassroots supporter's input! [So, we're thanking her by collecting 15,000 signatures in the next 24 hours to show the overwhelming grassroots support on her side! Can we count on you to be one of those signatures?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0499/72412298/4f0ff0f1/6104af67/1269557250/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/thanks-speaker-pelosi?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+So+wersquore+thanking+her+by+collecting+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200514_PelosiPost_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200514_PelosiPost_U1_X1")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0499/72412298/4f0ff0f1/6104af66/1269557250/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/thanks-speaker-pelosi?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200514_PelosiPost_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200514_PelosiPost_U1_X1") _The United States Postal Service is VITAL to increased vote-by-mail this November. Pelosi 's bill fills a funding gap that has threatened to COMPLETELY HALT their operations._ _**But that 's not all!**_ Speaker Pelosi has also included funding to help states transition to vote-by-mail in an attempt to save our democracy during coronavirus. These efforts are _INSTRUMENTAL_ to ensuring we have our voices heard this fall. Peter there is NO DOUBT Pelosi has an uphill battle ahead of her to get this funding passed! name: Team Michelle
subject: Did you see this interview?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Did you see Michelle De La Isla’s interview with Incite, friend?

Michelle sat down with Swati Mylavarapu to discuss her campaign for Kansas' 2nd District and why she's the leader Kansans need to lift up their voices in Congress. **[If you haven't had a chance, take a moment to check out their discussion.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17498095/196299647/-47688323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjA1NzZiOS00MDk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FcwHT_aWReEfrMvpmn6IIKBTIlUyBM2N4QWun-p3X8=&emci=f71a74fc-2b96-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=960576b9-4096-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)**

Michelle is a lifelong public servant who understands that service is about people -- not politics. Now, she's ready to bring her experiences to Congress to be a different kind of leader for Kansans.

**[But she can't flip this seat without your help. Chip in $10 or more to help send Michelle to Congress to be an advocate for all Kansans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17498096/196299648/-1952513085?gpsid=8_122_12898&refcode=em20_200514_incite_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200514_incite_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjA1NzZiOS00MDk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FcwHT_aWReEfrMvpmn6IIKBTIlUyBM2N4QWun-p3X8=)**

Michelle knows firsthand the problems facing families all across Kansas. She's experienced homelessness, survived domestic violence, defeated cancer, and attended college as a single mother.

Despite the obstacles, Michelle overcame the odds to help her family thrive. Now she wants to ensure all Kansans have the chance to succeed by fighting to protect quality healthcare, meaningful jobs with a living wage, access to quality education, and so much more.

**[If you're ready to send Michelle to Congress to be a different kind of leader, chip in right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17498097/196299649/-1952513085?gpsid=8_122_12898&refcode=em20_200514_incite_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200514_incite_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjA1NzZiOS00MDk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FcwHT_aWReEfrMvpmn6IIKBTIlUyBM2N4QWun-p3X8=)**

Thanks,

Team Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17498098/196299650/-1952513085?gpsid=8_122_12898&refcode=em20_200514_incite_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200514_incite_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjA1NzZiOS00MDk2LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FcwHT_aWReEfrMvpmn6IIKBTIlUyBM2N4QWun-p3X8=)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Winning this fight is more important than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
_We hope that you are keeping safe during this pandemic, Peter. We know this is a difficult time for many, so please only contribute if you are able to do so. We are more committed than ever to a Democratic victory in November and are grateful you 're in this fight._

Peter,
We already know that electing a Democratic majority in the Senate is paramount -- but the COVID-19 pandemic has made winning this 2020 fight more important than ever.
Right now, the Senate should be working overtime to support our working families, small businesses, and local governments through this public health emergency.
But Mitch McConnell is focused on filling the courts with unqualified, extreme conservatives.
The American people deserve better. They deserve a Senate that will put them first.
I am doing everything I can to ensure we flip the Senate this fall, but I need your support.
We need to win four GOP-held seats -- and we need to defend our Democratic seat in Illinois.
**[So here's my ask, Peter -- I still need to raise another $5,812 to meet my $10,000 fundraising goal before tomorrow. Will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200513i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200513i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4085/42ab3cf4/60ace1c5/135d2245/31826837/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4085/42ab3cf4/60ace1c5/135d2246/31826837/VEsC/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

Dear supporters, Today is the last day to mail your ballot! If you don't mail it now, then you'll need to [find a drop box](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.31r/8t0q5JnQRtWMBm-ZDhfKyQ/h1/islCL-2F49edrbIJ-2FFpRtWz5KnQFMeuNCBFLVAVUvb8WFxNH5lVImJdii0Ai8fBYxA-2FvfOhCb2L8S1uQ4rbOufF3ua2Vh0jDpzPn5UIK0ncH-2BUzqDlcKaHGgHduCcZLQ9tBBU74uHNhc3risATCF8zRHpWsQdhyCid3luqncz2nyoIwbQplJCCxB2i59qbO16-2B6a4IGt8DUJmJ3qsO7YgAbcCqQkGjvhnpBG5ZmTcS9tghPclxMiqDXiMDNGSXEL-2BAKadiULZajUkiq50rbEEmqwidH3ewYvQunG9YhIMV555JJ-2FYwmQgvaycBbNqikANdsHBvj737du9IDEiTsPjrIXOPbXFrWxmumHwuB4RwIEg-3D/akmS) in your county and turn it in by 8 PM on Tuesday May 19. Reply with a pic to us and we'll share it with the hashtag #TakeaStand! We are now less than one week out from the primary election and I have been reflecting on the campaign that we have built together. We started with a sense of urgency and optimism, that we need bold leadership in the face of the crisis facing our community, country, and climate -- and that we could build a grassroots movement to Take a Stand. Since we began last year, we have recruited hundreds of volunteers, received thousands of donations, and contacted tens of thousands of voters. Now, it's all on the line as we work together to make sure every Democrat votes in this unprecedented pandemic situation. We are spending every day on the phones with voters. The good news is that because of vote-by-mail, turn out projections for Oregon are projected to be on track for a similar number as the 2016 primary, when Sanders romped to victory in our district by double digits. **We are counting on every supporter to come through for the campaign in the next five days.** Please join us as a volunteer-from-home, wherever you are. Reply to this email to get started. If you can't make calls with us this weekend, make a contribution. We are coming up short and we need everyone to pitch in something so we can [cross the finish line first on May 19.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.31r/8t0q5JnQRtWMBm-ZDhfKyQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKl1kqrQfnn7Gx9zwUIeq2iDPZ26aI3-2B8rOurl6NGKO7Ss2jEDjfaiAvfHOr5qG59CWXfiNSHwUGuwH9MtREPRZpU3OKQmH-2B23eYKFJHkrwWuhbygdsnFD4LkuM7PRrA-2B4DzRL10YBHW-2FLuxM7egv6xB3ULnWM8e8sOXR3s2b-2BJXud3xwX-2B4Gzsnt8K94ZID7sQv5SfCbo5jLCyilXfphbkcMhc5VO7PI61WukXQLnfXSZ-2FWEAlxFijt9EHNNPQIBs8r4AppY03CGI0PqlF7-2FJX-2BZmKTV2Q1XhMiPsvr6GMZBSRkRHNxWVlvK-2FuRXb9tngJqyDRbVEBQ-2FQSKDwxarMiCv6mj8oE1u1CsC8qIwlcPw-3D-3D/Rqbc) We'll be going live on Facebook this evening at 6 pm to discuss the latest in news, politics, and the final leg of our primary campaign. Join us! Stay well, and stay in the fight! Doyle

Kurt Schrader Faces 1st Strong Challenge in Years: It's From A Fellow Democrat_** "Around the country, Democratic incumbents have increasingly found themselves challenged by progressive activists. In Oregon, Brand New Congress is also supporting Doyle Canning, a community organizer from Eugene running in the primary against Rep. Peter DeFazio, who has been in office since 1987."
---
[**Eugene Weekly**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.31r/8t0q5JnQRtWMBm-ZDhfKyQ/h6/b2QTIghpuhxPHS-2FxFUcaCJiF0ZJUiIR1h3LSY4IoJXxdRFlT-2FSIWxUgut9ZKhxf0cTFvu3sWbkplF14UEg00Qf-2BqpR7p8-2BsHn-2FPdlUObHRYp2kMinnaGDbhXdmVeh51mC8D8dX5ZZuPXYitdeMshBcZzQmvhkZajQ98sAde059YF6rclH0wpmJOIhCRgn-2B-2FXy8jC8wxZIA8YpCSOohaR8FOj0HyhN3cK45c4-2FS-2BNWBmth0Ma9DsjlXrPJKMBE7MmFwMCp1oAVx02ZGlERMiABudeaHPVkEhUzemz-2FNOolkNm1L9mYZArgX8cLXoML0xzllGN0LY425jfCDHB-2BhCY-2BoI7179t1Q3KRE9WK1oZ23w-3D/Pm5i) _**DeFazio Out of Touch**_ "As a voter who has historically voted for Congressman Peter DeFazio, I pause when I envision a Millennial or GenZ person's perception of the upcoming election. These generations have grown up with an endless war, immigrant families being put in cages at the border, police killings of black Americans, astronomical student loan debt, their school campuses becoming killing fields, subsidization of the fossil fuel industry while lobbyists line the pockets of politicians, and political leaders who have ignored science based predictions of global warming and climate disruption since DeFazio has been in office. Business as usual and status quo politicians will not wash with the younger generation or with me, a Boomer. Vote for Doyle Canning for the 4th Congressional District in this election. " - _Jim Neu_

Postage is pre-paid,** After today, you will have until 8 pm Tuesday **May 19** to take your ballot to a [drop box](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.31r/8t0q5JnQRtWMBm-ZDhfKyQ/h7/islCL-2F49edrbIJ-2FFpRtWz5KnQFMeuNCBFLVAVUvb8WFxNH5lVImJdii0Ai8fBYxA-2FvfOhCb2L8S1uQ4rbOufF-2Blas3JY8fWLttcy5nnQ2hGYU8yJFUqhgJ16AcCpVr7JKusmSTTfmSRJF6ZQUJ6yLsGAGR35iosTMsDwyYxJAeD8HV8k8ojxlfeVZUze9TS74AyOLUu0TwRE9mUMqErcyHz1CB41BpUFAL8OKK2FdKn6vD0xkdGqcHUU0QFYr64VedttokhedCZbtLWDuwFDRB8b5h1xUUK8BcnH1QvxK3s58lT73t5zsBs2Llye5HR-2BoUKQW1gCNYVj7-2BHK5rUONlUsYFm86GI9znJcjqZ47NM-3D/d7_u)! LEAGUE OF MINORITY VOTERS Lane County's League of Minority Voters had planned to host a debate at the LCC Longhouse in April. Due to COVID 19, that was cancelled, but the LMV asked the candidates to instead answer written questions regarding racial justice. Doyle was **the only candidate** who filled out the questionnaire. clean_body: Today is the last day to mail your ballot! If you don't mail it now, then you'll need to find a drop box in your county and turn it in by 8 PM on Tuesday May 19. | | | | The KVAL News team stopped by this week for a socially distant interview, airing tonight! Let us know if you watch it live, we will be sharing the online version on our social media channels soon! | Dear supporters, Today is the last day to mail your ballot! If you don't mail it now, then you'll need to in your county and turn it in by 8 PM on Tuesday May 19. Reply with a pic to us and we'll share it with the hashtag #TakeaStand! We are now less than one week out from the primary election and I have been reflecting on the campaign that we have built together. We started with a sense of urgency and optimism, that we need bold leadership in the face of the crisis facing our community, country, and climate -- and that we could build a grassroots movement to Take a Stand. Since we began last year, we have recruited hundreds of volunteers, received thousands of donations, and contacted tens of thousands of voters. Now, it's all on the line as we work together to make sure every Democrat votes in this unprecedented pandemic situation. We are spending every day on the phones with voters. The good news is that because of vote-by-mail, turn out projections for Oregon are projected to be on track for a similar number as the 2016 primary, when Sanders romped to victory in our district by double digits. We are counting on every supporter to come through for the campaign in the next five days. Please join us as a volunteer-from-home, wherever you are. Reply to this email to get started. If you can't make calls with us this weekend, make a contribution. We are coming up short and we need everyone to pitch in something so we can We'll be going live on Facebook this evening at 6 pm to discuss the latest in news, politics, and the final leg of our primary campaign. Join us! Stay well, and stay in the fight! Doyle ?linkid=7&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-oregonizer-candidates-forum-is-live&emailreferrer=email803270_from1084593&emailsubject=the-oregonizer-last-day-to-mail-your-ballot | IN THE NEWS... In Oregon, Brand New Congress is also supporting Doyle Canning, a community organizer from Eugene running in the primary against Rep. Peter DeFazio, who has been in office since 1987." DeFazio Out of Touch "As a voter who has historically voted for Congressman Peter DeFazio, I pause when I envision a Millennial or GenZ person's perception of the upcoming election. These generations have grown up with an endless war, immigrant families being put in cages at the border, police killings of black Americans, astronomical student loan debt, their school campuses becoming killing fields, subsidization of the fossil fuel industry while lobbyists line the pockets of politicians, and political leaders who have ignored science based predictions of global warming and climate disruption since DeFazio has been in office. Business as usual and status quo politicians will not wash with the younger generation or with me, a Boomer. Vote for Doyle Canning for the 4th Congressional District in this election. This campaign will be won on the airwaves and online. We're running a robust ads program, but the more content we can offer voters, the more likely they are to choose Admiral Mike on June 2.
Polls have already shown he's the most-liked candidate amongst Democrats, but to like him, voters need to hear his message, see his leadership, and know his positions on the issues that matter.
We can get all of that information to voters, but only with your help. We're not backed by a super PAC, and we don't have vast personal wealth to spend. **We rely on you, voters and citizens who are ready for change in Washington.**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Getting to a new normal for our kids
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This crisis has been tough for all of us, but it's been especially hard for our kids. I'm proud of the way they've adapted to our new circumstances and made distance learning a success, but there's no sugarcoating the fact that they've had to miss out on important milestones and time with friends. Technology is amazing, but it can't completely replace the value of in-person interactions and collaboration.
Today, I want to talk about how we can preserve some of the activities our kids are looking forward to - graduation, summer camp, and sports - while keeping them safe from COVID-19.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001juiwK1wEf23jhjJj5TA7R64EYNfehpYnfg1_qoYW8WAsETtjm4pjSQ8sUM1zmpzPwr1SmF8wp6BmFSpeaUqSc7DJ_-baC9oLLy12AESiXYv-_oF99UOLZcZuXDkEnAh68Isy5KXyK8l-GmFlabx7okTdm4NtTg27A8QbY1uSrWuHnVK6iFD0QBHB1wceS_CtdBcR2BmjUd8=&c=Y2OMRSjY_vdM-3WnjBW56ENpaZCuUYX-JlNfX3et_zn7BkMn8EjRNw==&ch=mDGNnnFCgyGhKcJv5jBN_MT3mQ0dvsDg2rtM8ZWGVuMUFygyMirqtg==)

| I want to start by addressing the Class of 2020 directly. I know this isn't the senior year you had hoped to have, and I know it's hard to not be able to go to prom and enjoy these last few weeks of the year with friends. I promise we're going to make this a special time for you. On June 15, we'll be airing our statewide graduation ceremony, 'Your Year 2020,' on Rhode Island PBS. The deadline to submit videos to be featured in the special is next Friday, May 22. If you're a member of the Class of 2020, we want to see you! Go to [www.ripbs.org/YourYear2020](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001juiwK1wEf23jhjJj5TA7R64EYNfehpYnfg1_qoYW8WAsETtjm4pjSQp2Zw5DXtn1zlUuN_9g7mtaRfoYomRAGlHP8Pe0l7apzAXCycjwZ_qg26kbKV_iFr8TIP7-hAECAq30BjN-6ROrVmrt3YOyAwabcGr8KzEeFLVhjgs95rfCTbhdFc23wlOjYkSC2BoeXAzBHGyMWzcbIu-ulNMMuDtyvSJXXRwWXEVC4upUZmcN0iknOqg5VsIplNKe4QkWL79Ygf27uTccY_N8Vvd2amlIHvNAN8schIalpMycceyRE4BObvu_i1Hh2SmrS65V-fSCmf9_ApC_ddyL7Vk6mnm48K4DhIKkzwwjC_tUb7hy_bbipWD95hBSnfuCjApo1SOxrvsGncti06bF42suU50Q0RS5-P-XmRKmvEQ4pC3PeSoFrlLTjFmwRtzKcN7phbyBCCfi4oRwHMraAdDycMnhVXZ1aKKERfbWSNU0DK4=&c=Y2OMRSjY_vdM-3WnjBW56ENpaZCuUYX-JlNfX3et_zn7BkMn8EjRNw==&ch=mDGNnnFCgyGhKcJv5jBN_MT3mQ0dvsDg2rtM8ZWGVuMUFygyMirqtg==) for more details. I also want to take some time today to talk about our plan for summer camps. We plan to allow summer camps and other youth summer programs to operate in person--under new, strict regulations--starting June 29. Now, I want to set expectations: this year, summer camp is going to look and feel different than usual. Later next week, I will have more to share about the specific regulations we'll be requiring summer camps to follow. It will look a little different depending on the size and type of the camp. But we know some things will be necessary: stable groups of ten kids of less, frequent deep cleaning and hand-sanitization and ensuring that groups are keeping appropriate social distancing. As with all our reopening guidance, that information will be posted in full on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001juiwK1wEf23jhjJj5TA7R64EYNfehpYnfg1_qoYW8WAsETtjm4pjSQp2Zw5DXtn1_WJAGGH0hx3WBZ39-JEjyIzxG8SzxTSSRgzwRzxBcwILRLmcmFnQ8VGQ--DeXmmrZhDP10R8TdDYa5paRQ3PoicHSwPYLF7TWc1cM8GAHmDlCYpPNfO4wzd-iHLSn4NaQy1kDW3_tv99kdNULXCYDMDygaEfL2xjkaGpZkv2LQPg8vY56rsSaA3mAXcLTyuRr9XJuReVxCtoKltg3Z3wmyWyAJov2rjwJkyqu9fnoZeFAUbYLgLFwIlikcj-DbVLITi-4ezHB7RSMGoQG_5k57QBNCTkz7QliBgKIEe6NaJoTALmwmgKeal_Dv8ZSiqk6PJ9wHxJrdeP2kiaV5p_aiQ0v1lE3IGzxU-H8J_sjQ7pmJJJ86jEQgyzDtk038wc8OSufND3OyeAdqBmahgsmAuEpgm3Txsg&c=Y2OMRSjY_vdM-3WnjBW56ENpaZCuUYX-JlNfX3et_zn7BkMn8EjRNw==&ch=mDGNnnFCgyGhKcJv5jBN_MT3mQ0dvsDg2rtM8ZWGVuMUFygyMirqtg==) when it's ready next week.

| I know these are less than ideal circumstances, and some of these regulations will change the day-to-day experience of beloved Rhode Island summer camps that have relied on large group gatherings. I wish it didn't have to be this way. But I know how important these activities are for our kids--they have been for my own kids through the years, just like they were for me when I was child. I want our kids to have some semblance of normalcy this summer. But safety will always come first. We've also been getting a lot of questions about libraries. All library buildings are closed, but libraries are finding creative ways to get books to the community. Right now, during Phase 1, about half of our libraries are offering curbside pickup of preordered library books. Services at local public libraries may vary, so you should contact your local public library for more information. As we move into Phase 2, many libraries will start offering limited, touchless browsing in designated areas of the library, while curbside pickup will continue. Some libraries will start offering limited access to public computers. All-in-library services will be provided in accordance with our regulations for social distancing, mask-wearing, and cleaning. More information is available on [OLIS.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001juiwK1wEf23jhjJj5TA7R64EYNfehpYnfg1_qoYW8WAsETtjm4pjSQp2Zw5DXtn13lJx6bFVaOEA_mxhg6wb9-qEQbbzIIBC08TBq0rn9GsCgbTE51jgHL9GIYplNMLc2Pq7_FcMq0voYsfmMwPse-5Eoqpd9FnZp9qyZFG9ErcGJQc2RsfFNluq8qJ-O2lp&c=Y2OMRSjY_vdM-3WnjBW56ENpaZCuUYX-JlNfX3et_zn7BkMn8EjRNw==&ch=mDGNnnFCgyGhKcJv5jBN_MT3mQ0dvsDg2rtM8ZWGVuMUFygyMirqtg==)
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001juiwK1wEf23jhjJj5TA7R64EYNfehpYnfg1_qoYW8WAsETtjm4pjSQp2Zw5DXtn1WhBTgBScWs23VtkRBP3eyFwlDDFFr8iAUzb4nQAUI4C-0otaxrHxtEbvF8P-012UisEeXCAdllm0gXdrRI8SwMqoSaZNVHU_MzxHc6VvJQizKUE1rn6jyKsSttzPENxEw3MYqqKN8MR7yOt8-iPd2fzsoiIvzruwZiKI77Nceaozjy_bKs55PD5IWZyHrbtcQNsUmWsl6V5djvkIHuFv7zJCkaKyDYJBAXRJ9Ol9YupqVghBNRprC-S3Jx2-BlRCA-WqTDzZ0ow=&c=Y2OMRSjY_vdM-3WnjBW56ENpaZCuUYX-JlNfX3et_zn7BkMn8EjRNw==&ch=mDGNnnFCgyGhKcJv5jBN_MT3mQ0dvsDg2rtM8ZWGVuMUFygyMirqtg==).

**THEN:** _Roll Call_ named her one of the most vulnerable senators in the ENTIRE country - in a race _The Washington Post_ says is KEY to deciding Senate control.
**NOW:** Loeffler just launched a $4 MILLION ad blitz to save her floundering campaign, buy this seat and protect the GOP's majority.
Senate control is at stake, the GOP is vulnerable and recent polling shows Loeffler and Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) locked in a _dead heat_. If we don't fight back now, we'll lose our best shot at taking back the Senate.

name: Roseanne Barr
subject: Millennial Bartenders Fake Crying in ICE Parking Lots
body:
If you’re like me, you’re probably sitting home on government mandated quarantine wondering what the hell happened to your country. Every time you turn on the news you get the darndest feeling that you are no longer in the land of the free, but a hostage in a timeshare-style pitch meeting for communism.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998779-d4464bfb27-f77967259f)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f) It’s Roseanne Barr. Yes, **that** Roseanne Barr.

If you’re like me, you’re probably sitting home on government mandated quarantine wondering what the hell happened to your country. Every time you turn on the news you get the darndest feeling that you are no longer in the land of the free, but a hostage in a timeshare-style pitch meeting for communism.

You’re tired of seeing millennial bartenders fake crying in ICE parking lots, virtue signaling their radical base of credit card hippies who think Greta Thunberg is an expert on infectious diseases while you’re told that you are a deplorable human being for wanting people to be able to work and feed their families.

You’re tired of thinking that you’re the only sane person in a world gone crazy . . . trust me, I get it, **BUT you’re not alone**.

You’re tired, and so am I.

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f)
You’re wondering, how do we get off this crazy train?

It’s simple; we send the socialist, Do-Nothing Democrats in charge back home to their districts that are covered in the feces of drug addicted homeless people they care more about than hard working tax paying Americans and replace them with freedom loving patriots in Congress.

And that’s why I am writing to you right now . . . I have a close personal friend who is running for Congress in Florida’s 21st District and [**she needs your support!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f)

This election is no longer simply Republican vs. Democrat... its Freedom vs. Tyranny! And this woman is the way back!

[**That woman is my good friend Laura Loomer!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f)

We need strong patriotic women in Washington representing you and me, **and Laura is that woman**.

I’m backing Laura Loomer – [and you’re going to back Laura Loomer](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f) – **because Ilhan, AOC, and the rest of the Democrats are TERRIFIED of her!**

**[Donate now. Give her all the money you can](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f) and then knock on your neighbor Bob’s door and tell him to give you the $10 he owes you for beer money last November [and give that to Laura too!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f)**

If you want to send a young woman to Congress that will MAKE YOU PROUD, [then YOU have to back her with all you got!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f)

[Pony up and give Laura Loomer all your money!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-375837-884534-4998778-db896c5033-f77967259f)

Thank you!

Roseanne Barr
Actress
Domestic Goddess
Crazy Lady

Every time you turn on the news you get the darndest feeling that you are no longer in the land of the free, but a hostage in a timeshare-style pitch meeting for communism. | | | Patriot, It’s Roseanne Barr. Yes, that Roseanne Barr. If you’re like me, you’re probably sitting home on government mandated quarantine wondering what the hell happened to your country. Every time you turn on the news you get the darndest feeling that you are no longer in the land of the free, but a hostage in a timeshare-style pitch meeting for communism. You’re tired of seeing millennial bartenders fake crying in ICE parking lots, virtue signaling their radical base of credit card hippies who think Greta Thunberg is an expert on infectious diseases while you’re told that you are a deplorable human being for wanting people to be able to work and feed their families. You’re tired of thinking that you’re the only sane person in a world gone crazy . . . trust me, I get it, BUT you’re not alone. You’re tired, and so am I. You’re wondering, how do we get off this crazy train? It’s simple; we send the socialist, Do-Nothing Democrats in charge back home to their districts that are covered in the feces of drug addicted homeless people they care more about than hard working tax paying Americans and replace them with freedom loving patriots in Congress. And that’s why I am writing to you right now . . . I have a close personal friend who is running for Congress in Florida’s 21st District and This election is no longer simply Republican vs. Democrat... its Freedom vs. Tyranny! And this woman is the way back! We need strong patriotic women in Washington representing you and me, and Laura is that woman. I’m backing Laura Loomer – – because Ilhan, AOC, and the rest of the Democrats are TERRIFIED of her! and then knock on your neighbor Bob’s door and tell him to give you the $10 he owes you for beer money last November If you want to send a young woman to Congress that will MAKE YOU PROUD, Thank you! Roseanne Barr Actress Domestic Goddess Crazy Lady Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: AP: "Smith [has] an edge in the fall rematch."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

This is certainly not the outcome we were hoping for in this special election.

**But just because we did not win this special election does not mean we are done fighting. We're on to November, starting _right now._ **

We knew all along that the special election was going to be tough, and that was before the pandemic happened. The good news is that our path to victory in the fall with a significantly higher voter turnout is very strong. No rest for the weary.

**[The work to take this seat back on November 3rd starts right now. Chip in now to keep us running full steam ahead for our rematch.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a01/2925043734/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a02/2925043734/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a03/2925043734/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a1c/2925043734/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a1d/2925043734/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a1e/2925043734/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a01/2925043734/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full")
This special election was always going to be much tougher for us than this November. The voters who turn out in special elections are less inclined to vote our way, and we were running in unprecedented circumstances.

In November, Democratic voters will show up en masse for the general election.

As an AP political reporter wrote, "November typically draws a large Democratic turnout in California, particularly in presidential election years, which would give **Smith an edge in the fall rematch.** "

This was not our moment, but we will not stop working to make our moment count in November.

**[We want you with us every step of the way on our path to victory in November -- can you chip in now to keep our momentum up as we continue our campaign?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a01/2925043734/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full")**

Thanks so much for all of your support. We aren't worried -- we know you're still with us.

\-- Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign Manager, Christy for Congress
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb4/29776869/98e258e/569f2a01/2925043734/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTRfcGl2b3QxLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200514_pivot1-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

name: URGENT [re: what Dr. Fauci said]
subject: Don't let Trump fire Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously taken part in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48b2/4bd7760e/5c48bb52/77aece0b/436222441/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire&source=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire&refcode=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48b2/4bd7760e/5c48bb52/77aece0a/436222441/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1YzQ4YmI1MiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0OGIyIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5c48bb52/29bb48b2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire&source=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire&refcode=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire") to unsubscribe.
| **BREAKING:** After Dr. Fauci testified, Trump launched ANOTHER wave of attacks against him. Last time **Trump teased that he was going to FIRE Dr. Fauci.**

We have to make sure now that if Trump is attacking Dr. Fauci we stand up and demand that Trump leaves the doctor alone.

**[EMERGENCY SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign on to save Dr. Fauci's job](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48b2/4bd7760e/5c48bb52/77aece09/436222441/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/save-dr-fauci-s-job?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+EMERGENCY+SIGNATURES+NEEDED+Sign+on+to+s&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire&source=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire&refcode=314_EM_PT_200514_1MC_none_STD_2_FauciPetSurvFire")** Right now, Americans need our leaders to be unified behind a scientific-based approach to handling this pandemic.

Instead, Trump has been publically attacking Dr. Fauci, the top epidemiologist in the country - he's even re-tweeted content with #FireFauci in it.

**[That is why we have to act FAST to save Dr. Fauci's job. **[Y'all -- Texans are sick and tired of this kind of self-interested hypocrisy by career politician Senator Cornyn.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006d/7f51f7bc/4fb7e36b/4ef14e43/2974835889/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-texas-protectaca?refcode=email_20200514.3nd__1431__&amount=10")** As we confront this pandemic, Texans cannot afford their elected leaders playing political games with their health care. **We need health care coverage and we need a leader who is unafraid to fight for it.**
**The real "good news" here:
MJ Hegar is ready to fight for our health care coverage.**

We can't expect Sen. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: See what Nancy Pelosi stuffed in her partisan ‘Coronavirus’ bill
body:
If House Democrats are focused on helping Americans get through this global pandemic safely, they sure have a funny way of showing it. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1ebfa74f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 14, 2020
---
| | |
# **Nancy Pelosi’s left-wing wish list**

**If House Democrats** are focused on helping Americans get through this global pandemic safely, they sure have a funny way of showing it.

**Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s** latest extravagant, $3 trillion spending proposal is Washington at its worst—and most predictable. While President Trump, governors of both parties, and frontline workers band together to fight this virus as one country, House Democrats see an opportunity to exploit this crisis to pass their partisan agenda.

**Millions of Americans** are out of work. President Trump is trying to get them back on the job by safely reopening our country. Instead of helping him do it, here is what Democrats in Congress have decided is worth holding Coronavirus relief hostage for:
* **A BAN on information** about low-cost health insurance. That’s right—House Democrats want to _forbid_ the government from sharing any information with you about lower-cost health options such as association plans or short-term plans. Even as families try to cope with job and wage losses, Speaker Pelosi doesn’t want them to learn about options that are up to 60 percent cheaper than Obamacare.

* **Mass voting by mail**. A “Coronavirus relief” bill might seem like the wrong time and place to dictate how states run their elections. Democrats disagree.

* **Stimulus checks for illegal aliens.** Rather than protect American citizens by requiring a Social Security Number for taxpayer-funded stimulus, Pelosi’s bill would give illegal immigrants the ability to receive up to $1,200 in direct payouts.

* **Bailouts... for government.** Democrats want more than $1 trillion in cash for state and local governments, mostly in the form of unrestricted aid that doesn’t need to be used to offset Coronavirus costs. They also threw in a $25 billion bailout for the Post Office.

**The list goes on. **At a moment when Americans most need Washington to look out for them and cut the partisan drama, Democrat leaders once again chose to put their far-left base first.

**MORE:** [“Democrats’ new $3 trillion Coronavirus spending wishlist is another embarrassing farce”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71a688734c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump is protecting our national stockpile**

**When the Coronavirus struck** , President Trump knew that America needed to act quickly. He worked with Congress to secure $16 billion to build up our national stockpile with ventilators, masks, respirators, pharmaceuticals, and other critical supplies.

**As a result** , America today has an abundant supply of ventilators, N95 respirators, and resources for testing—a crucial area where we [now lead the world](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92ba4a94e5&e=3ee4985eea).

**But that’s only the start**. President Trump knows that America’s long-term self-reliance depends on our supply chain. “Our goal for the future must be to have American medicine for American patients, American supplies for American hospitals, and American equipment for our great American heroes,” he says.

**“Now, both parties** must unite to ensure the United States is truly an independent nation in every sense of the word.”

**Today, the President** traveled to Pennsylvania, visiting a distribution center that’s played a key role in helping to restock America.

**Just since February** , the Owens & Minor Distribution Center in Upper Macungie has deployed 1.75 million N95 respirators, 3.4 million gowns, 80 million gloves, and much more across our country. “You’re making America proud,” President Trump told them.

[President Trump: “We are reclaiming our heritage as a nation of manufacturers!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70014908ee&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **WATCH****: **[Our supply chains need to be HERE, not overseas](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5bf248372&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump arrives in Allentown, Pennsylvania** | May 14, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d20d5344b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0373351d2f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cc27d136b1)
---

---
